name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: No voter ID, no problem!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
At least that's what the Democrats want [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-r/) _Peter,_ Don't be fooled - YOUR vote is under attack from Washington! **Every single fraudulent, improper, illegal vote cast in Wisconsin means an equal number of _legal_ votes get canceled - YOUR vote gets canceled! ** [Will you Stand Up For Our Elections? -- ADD YOUR NAME >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-y/) It's no secret why the Democrats are doing what they're doing.Biden, Pelosi, and the Democrats are **terrified** of what's going to happen this November. They know that the American people are fed up and fighting back against the failures they're seeing from Washington. That's why they tried to kill the filibuster to ram through a massive elections takeover through Congress.We stopped them this time, but the Biden administration is reportedly looking at using his executive orders to incorporate parts of their elections bill and cut Congress out of the picture!Meanwhile, you're required to use a Photo ID to eat in a restaurant in D.C., but they want to ban using a Photo ID to VOTE!Will you stand up for the integrity of our elections? [PETITION: Stand Up For Election Integrity!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-j/) Add your name to my Congressional petition to:
* DEFEND the Photo ID requirement
* Keep elections local - NO federal takeover!
* STOP the weaponization of the federal bureaucracy in our elections

As your Congressman, I will always fight for election integrity but **_[I need your support in this fight for our democracy!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-t/) _**Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald [ADD YOUR NAME - ELECTION INTEGRITY >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-u/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-o/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-cuubkd-D494E01E-yuhdluddtl-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cuubkd-yuhdluddtl-n/)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdb39l784i5h91ou4clolejjdh6po2c4s8mq5sn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgmaoj1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s716irjdc35ctj61pr5c8rj4c9mc8pbcppkslpb2sdk6dr78d5ks3hjaphmckoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applm3jr4db66jjjbdhnm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6p8v897let1m6iabf3r45653jug1ac3k9q55fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgmaoj1cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo01rb0o499k70gr9mvmcid5eqdh8sa34kscvv9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgmaoj1cph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znlf8epi0t80ncb9jmmubo4gtkmfnsbpnf5370h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgmaoj1cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z4stcufcak334bereadif8fa4s00bqigeso7fi8o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdksvhkl9ag933b91chi51rrltceh10tc8c2evt8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c5i62pb2c5j649fg)

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6789%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aX%2bWOkrZ5wfAvF4P4nodjg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69842%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zJZzGG7rOMW2BDqnpEPsrA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69843%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4zYED42hblAipkmVK%2b6JMw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69843%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4zYED42hblAipkmVK%2b6JMw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6789%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aX%2bWOkrZ5wfAvF4P4nodjg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6789%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aX%2bWOkrZ5wfAvF4P4nodjg&sysid=1)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: they want me in jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Dear Peter --

Time is short, and I need your help right away.

RINO Liz Cheney and Communist Democrats like Adam Schiff on the Soviet-style **January 6 Witch Hunt committee are demanding my phone records so they can leak them to CNN and the rest of the fake news media**. . .

The D.C. swamp is waging a scorched earth war against me because I fought for President Trump, and I fought for you.

And the Never Trump RINOs like Cheney and the Communist Democrats are terrified that they can't bully me into backing down.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r) [ **SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF SUPPORT** ****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r) **[FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** Now Cheney, Schiff, and the rest of their Communist Democrat pals think they can silence me by seizing my phone records and leaking the contents of my communication to the public.

But time is running out before RINO Liz Cheney and the Communist Democrats leak my text messages.

**[Do you stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)**?
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r) **[SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF SUPPORT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** **[FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** The January 6 witch hunt committee already voted to throw two President Trump aides in jail!

**And Never Trump RINO Liz Cheney openly threatened to charge President Trump with a crime.**

Adam Schiff. . .Liz Cheney. . .Nancy Pelosi. . .

**They want to throw me and my colleagues in jail!**

There is no one in Congress with a bigger bullseye on their back than me.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r) **[SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF SUPPORT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** **[FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** Liz Cheney and the Communist Democrats scheme to disclose my text messages to her pals in the fake news media because I stood up to their lies and police state power grabs.

[**That 's why I hope you'll sign your statement of support and then rush an emergency contribution of $17.76 right away**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r).

Never-Trumpers teamed with Communist Democrats to kick me off my committees and expel me from Congress from day one.

**But they couldn 't get me the first time, or the second time, or the third time**. . .

So now, they're coming after me with this bogus January 6 Witch Hunt Committee.

Here's why:

Never Trumpers and Communist Democrats seethed over the fact that I refused to play the swamp's games.

I've led the fight to:

**> >>** _Impeach Joe Biden_ for his lawless presidency and allowing an illegal alien invasion of America;

**> >>** _Sue Nancy Pelosi_ over her illegal mask mandate;

**> >>** _Fire Dr. Fauci_ for his lies and tyrannical and unconstitutional vaccine mandate; and

**> >>** _Stop the Communist Democrat_ takeover of our elections and demand a full audit of 2020.

Now Liz Cheney is triggering the nuclear option.
**
Leaking my text messages and phone records is the DC Swamps revenge for leading the fight for Donald Trump 's America First movement**.

But in reality, they are not just after me. **They 're after you**.

I'm just in their way.

**And I won 't back down. I won't give an inch.**

I will fight back twice as hard.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r) **[SIGN YOUR "STAND WITH MTG" STATEMENT OF SUPPORT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** **[FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)** Time is running out before Liz Cheney, Adam Schiff and the Communist Democrats on the January 6 Witch Hunt committee violate my privacy and leak my text messages to the fake news media.

And need to know if I can count on your support in this fight.

**[So please, sign your"MTG](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)****[ Statement of Support" and then chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59600284:WSbyncHYN:m:1:2365227053:9857848E77CF159E26440C555496087A:r)**.
Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Republican Congresswoman (Georgia)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf3moqvkqiuukeojcaahnt65e9gddrfo1hptqt10_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr1otgcqrm4sdnctjjcpb4elqe1c776mqmcd3n6eor5d30mdpm7c5im9rj1crnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbc77m8o6ctj0mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gm8ob0s3h61oh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhj9eijj6c45s65ij7rvgrjqmt4p7ppdb8b4kpsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgm1o72c3h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeksjgfl9qk0qs34e43lvme4tm13fcrt078l1mj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgm1o72c3h2bs)[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zojatpcmrbo1vqb2m3pcch7qsilr8oqnplimvct8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgm1o72c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp92hsd34r6g8p4ffpv3fej7uungncn978qbld3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgm1o72c3h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvp8dtof7j11kkogp73a7utht222k2n5qsnlcel8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chgm1o72c3h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zheupa18p68ahv2ajvbq9qle2toa4d9d23o4umq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdcljeio64ob76kqb6cpj65g75c776komaotlchhbfdbgeap70ornmsrr8p9k6srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddgs1p30phh62pm8dtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm2p35c1hm4pb24no)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z38sa2chcbu87eu5pb8e8qp7v48ukt4iji1r0dto_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3s6n1a94484530iv2kd49iqrtsmpi4vgka9h0a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9c5jua5imn8kfl5gjn7dje0s8ivebi14u257ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoq61la9ock6ri41taisfhha0uq4nqmon898re2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi6cicc1v5tjmh2k5st4v4n193l59rmf4durinpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc3tjj6osbe7t749s5avchrj5rf2qr5s0q54ft60_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z24b34atppedqrits5n86msqh80jcs0rq9epetb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedjcr09d3ncca1jtcvvj6rr2q7ocei3irnrtteg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmiuti3tmu3bgvl0voe4fbd3muonqc6gbsb725h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zhap2sicjgqbtllnpl8oh59vk8n4k4qco6pov4l0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zff9slnb50jj745lgfh7uaa9b7oseqhnoelhv13g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim0or2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
My radical opponent [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8422%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7GHNOTHvbfUsr3EgcVHhRg&sysid=1)

---

Folks,

There’s no sugar-coating it. This has been a really tough month for my Senate re-election. **I’ve got a Left-of-Lenin opponent who makes AOC look like patty cake and I need your help to stop him.**

We lost some ground in the fight against the Radical Left, and I’ve got to have your support to make up ground against Chuck Schumer and his **Socialist candidate!**

**_[I’ve set a tough goal for my End-of-Month Deadline, but I know with your support, it’ll be as easy as pie. Can I count on your support?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13825%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8TqAnW67TW4VxfY0aaHHgA&sysid=1)_**

**You can help me make a huge step in the right direction.** With the help of your friends and family _who also love and support this country,_ we might be able to get Chuck Schumer out of the Senate in 2022.

[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt7jb2m76lt644c6dho6o14h9lpfv0dpdi3b1t5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk61h68cthm3hmeppgcdi7atphcqqjacr6mhh32t71m6qbctthm8pm6c74eipneduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4d3662qbbcb7m8omcc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb3huv83ppka5f3ul0gtecc4bf7chhi5vve0g5s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Thank You for Your Support!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your donation to our campaign in January. You are crucial to our grassroots efforts!
Hi Peter, **I wanted to reach out and thank you for helping our grassroots movement. Your donation to our campaign in the month of January has helped us bolster our resources for the upcoming election this November.** Your contribution helps our volunteers and staff educate voters, plan events, and continue to do the great work they do. It also helps us expand our voter outreach efforts to make sure we turn Wisconsin red and advance our conservative solutions.Again, thank you for your support. All of your contributions help us greatly.Thanks,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zidjjuy-idtjvlhlh-r/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zidjjuy-idtjvlhlh-y/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zidjjuy-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zidjjuy-idtjvlhlh-t/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zidjjuy-l-d) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zst142r3tbev513cq2ktginrs73kb0a508u3rneg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe1pphc3in9dlhcaor4p1m65q38crj6dp3adhgslgjatb16sqr9dbkc6pb0tb0cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbc70e8p6cdb4mdj3fc5lclp2bs)
| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4hh1ui3ul0ouk13pmbu86oemglqur1nv1t5v188_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb697vsh2huigjkaq2g44p51tg4opt1m9rmtthj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znmsl29vp5dp6j3l2s57io0ismbm029t7si7uhio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim4ob4cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| | Peter, it’s Luke, Jasmine’s campaign manager. Before I meet with our senior leadership team to go over our election year strategy, I wanted to check in directly with supporters like you who have been with us from the start. We have big plans for 2022 to expand our organizing efforts across Western North Carolina to share Jasmine’s vision of love, hope, and empathy. But to build a winning strategy, we’re counting on your input to help us shape our grassroots campaign. [**Will you take our Election Year Strategy Survey to let us know what your priorities are?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41483116/329009148/282241105?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTlhMGMxMi01NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YB7LZOIlg1HcVANkq7-Kq0Ktft2_0Jb_lzBVK4MDAMI=&emci=c0273da4-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=fe9a0c12-5587-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=22032259) | | | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41483117/329009149/282241105?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTlhMGMxMi01NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YB7LZOIlg1HcVANkq7-Kq0Ktft2_0Jb_lzBVK4MDAMI=&emci=c0273da4-1485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=fe9a0c12-5587-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=22032259)

body:
I approach each session with an open mind and a willingness to listen

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41485397/329014510/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220206-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWQ4YzY2ZS01Nzg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7l-ZQkPQE0iO7caljhiXpM_AXyVpdC47Wcc8UUCyqT8=)

| Peter,

I am proud to be a healthcare provider. In my work as a mental health therapist, I approach each session with an open mind and a willingness to listen — and that’s exactly what I’ll bring to serving Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9ouhartnl4h0ia66jrt5187vkncq84kkognm2o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u2qb8d1ic9o75dtge8pb2pdj62o6bddhcphm6thks9jrcdllelpj4p1iedr3adtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchkcoob9ddjcur64phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c5i6aor0c9i649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45nq47pubc6r5kajtp23h1l755os7eml6r17fi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim6o32chh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9cn0b7qhtl6kffgcfr9mfgi0d0pcli9o9i77kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim6o32chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqq4ksj4tumpiq9hbjienpi7cme2jtq3jsr5v40g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chim6o32chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Team, it’s a foregone conclusion that Trump will run again in 2024.
What we can’t wrap our heads around is that the GOP, even the members that voted to impeach Trump, are considering supporting his next presidential bid! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020622_1]
CNN best described the GOP’s reaction to Trump-era lies, threats and bluster:
“A collective shrug.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020622_1]
DASS hasn’t given up on democracy – even if the entire GOP has. We’re fighting back against the extremists who want to put Trump back into office. Rush $20 ASAP to join the fight and defeat the far-right! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020622_1]

subject: Reminder: Did you see our campaign's BIG NEWS this week?

body:
Read more about our campaign and show your support by making a donation to support Geoff today.

---
| Dear Friend,
Did you see this week's BIG NEWS?
Geoff proudly announced that COREY LEWANDOWSKI has agreed to serve as our senior campaign advisor!
---
|
---
| Lewandowski is a Lowell native and longtime Republican strategist, and a veteran of hundreds of campaigns at all levels of government.
"I am pleased to have Corey on the team and honored that he believes in this campaign," Geoff said. "Corey has worked on campaigns at every level of government, including the presidential level, and is a key advisor to have in running this campaign."
Even Maura Healey's campaign was quick to take notice!

| | Folks, I know firsthand how important agriculture is to our community and economy – I grew up the grandson of sharecroppers in rural North Carolina, and many of my friends and neighbors today are farmers. As a young boy, I saw the labor of love that folks put into the land. Rain or shine, hot or cold, farmers would be out tending to their crops, knowing how important their work was to sustaining our economy and lifestyles. Agriculture has been the cornerstone of America’s economy since our nation began. In 2019, agriculture and related industries contributed _$1.109 trillion_ to our GDP. And in North Carolina, agriculture is the backbone of rural communities. Small-scale farms make up 87 percent of all farms in North Carolina, and in my home county of Robeson, these rural farms bring in nearly _$400 million_ in market value every year. Thousands of hardworking people, my family and neighbors included, depend on successful fruit, vegetable, livestock, timber, and poultry farms. That’s why in Congress I’m going to promote farmers and farm workers to grow North Carolina’s agriculture economy. I’ll develop consistent policies to accommodate the uncertainty our farmers and farm-workers deal with as a result of climate change. And, I’ll support coherent legislation on trade and tariffs that will keep markets open to our farmers. But, I need your help to get to Congress and fight for farmers’ interests – interests that are too often overlooked. [**Will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign by midnight tonight? My race in North Carolina is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the state, and every dollar helps me keep up with my opponents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41492208/329044507/-1554514855?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220206_FR_Agriculture_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjczMmVkNi02NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJGT_r9EAJapRcv896biTBU09j6v98CnGHPJDCQvpFo=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41492209/329044508/-1554514855?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220206_FR_Agriculture_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjczMmVkNi02NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJGT_r9EAJapRcv896biTBU09j6v98CnGHPJDCQvpFo=)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Fellow American, By now, I'm sure you're as furious as I am with the White House's absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it's not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don't comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden's. And if we don't stand up against it now, there's no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [** _That's why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA's National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-7_5IvIpTYQ)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._sy56x1ACrOY-aRlQ9-Q) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we've launched a **"NO FORCED VAX"** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we're shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It's about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students -the least affected by the disease - must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we'll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you'll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-9jSClPZKzQ0rNzi9f7w)[**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Thank you for your support!For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDM3LTc5MWZiNjkwNDJjMjQyOWM4MzY0MmFiNzA1M2QxNjc3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/WgUT-FF-3bWg1ApkHyYIzg) to unsubscribe.

subject: You only need 15 seconds to read this email

body:
|

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: $3 can help us stop Dr. Oz from buying this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With your support, we’ll have the resources to fight back against Dr. Oz’s avalanche of money
#

$3.
If you knew that $3 could help us stop Dr. Oz from buying Pennsylvania’s Senate seat, wouldn’t you contribute?
That’s what we’re asking of you today, because Dr. Oz has already spent $5 million of his own dollars trying to buy his way into the United States Senate.
Malcolm Kenyatta is a working person from a working family. He can’t afford to self-fund, and that’s exactly why we need him fighting for us in Washington.
That’s why we’re calling on you today. With your support, we’ll have the resources to fight back against Dr. Oz’s avalanche of money and take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate.
[So, what do you say? Can you pitch in $3 to Malcolm’s campaign for working families today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41492457/329045354/-358086307?refcode2=a1732ed6-6587-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220206-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTczMmVkNi02NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OlSxxKfZTBZJv2Q4SQTo2FU_R7MmD06U8FN0784zxw=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41492459/329045356/-358086307?refcode2=a1732ed6-6587-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220206-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTczMmVkNi02NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1OlSxxKfZTBZJv2Q4SQTo2FU_R7MmD06U8FN0784zxw=)**
We know $3 may not seem like much compared to Dr. Oz’s immense personal wealth, but when you add your contribution, and the next person reading this email adds theirs, and so on, it adds up fast.
Thanks for everything you do to support our movement,
Team Malcolm

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWiSmXcHgN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWiSmXcHgN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Dangerous
left-wing ideologies are taking hold, thanks to a decades-long
campaign by "progressives" to attack the Constitution and
undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
CANNOT let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to give your opinion
of the state of education in America.

Give Your
Opinion On The State of American Education

It's
apparent that the current education system is not only failing
millions of young Americans, but it is INDOCTRINATING rather than
EDUCATING them.

These are
the young people that "educators" deliberately deceived. These
are the young people who haven't learned the true history of our
country.

To
preserve liberty and prosperity in America, do you believe it is
essential for Americans to have basic knowledge of American
history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?

Are
colleges and universities in your state doing enough to teach
students American history and civics?

If you
are concerned about the current state of our educational system,
please share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today.

Give Your Opinion On The State of American Education

For our children,

Bill Gray

Class of 2001

Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach

Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

body:
If Maggie Hassan loses in New Hampshire, then we lose our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority.
| | |

**FIRST:** Mitch McConnell's dark-money allies spent MILLIONS in attack ads against Sen. Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.

**THEN:** TWO extreme Republicans jumped in the race to try to defeat Sen. Hassan and take back the Senate.

subject: Reminder: Endorsement Alert: Dr. Joseph Varon

body:
Nationally Recognized MD Supports Brett Guillory
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZfybbLSTFGn6xNs8G0-ik8QlV6PggPWfH7cLJ3edsEP0B0-51Qbskru-0jo7U-dLnIJP-NT892SXSeoSa78_sQD1AjDhalkdzZCxMNfDvt56t8in30ishCAj06xGOebG0ffT5HyMpiPPaZ-bzaOAeWW3fxFrd1YKFbaZ5kHabo=&c=e_W26iJsEXWFHn6JT2TPSE3K2pSqZFCNnMDNpCNwA2YnoXtODeIPhQ==&ch=9AIzNewOsHqYLrkVyzAhFC8KgkNl0LOA4sn2uFO5_WZGRn8NyumsEQ==)

---
| Dear Neighbor,
I'm pleased to announce that I've received the endorsement of Dr. Joseph Varon for U.S. Congress.
---
---
In 2020, Dr. Varon received national attention for his tireless service to COVID-afflicted patients, working more than 280 days straight to care for their health. Since then, his selfless work has continued, but unfortunately, has not received the same, positive recognition from his peers or from a press which seeks to repress anyone that doesn't support their "approved" narrative.
Due to his use of Ivermectin as part of a protocol to treat his patients, Dr. Varon has faced backlash, censorship, and has even had his license threatened. The good news: patients from across the country and from Mexico still make their way to Houston to seek his care and the treatments they can't get from other doctors.
---
---
It goes without saying how honored I am to have the endorsement and support of such a courageous fighter, as well as, a man who - at great cost - puts first the health and lives of his patients. My commitment to both Dr. Varon and Dr. Mary Talley Bowden is to always fight for our medical freedom and to hold to account those that threaten these great doctors and their licenses.
---
---

name: Democratic Strategy Update
subject: What James Carville said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
moments like this can make or break a campaign
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41493894/329053106/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2377-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NjNTJiOS02YTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8o80-g8eh89JmtZoBbLUfGUZA0xamAAbGXf-SVfB3E=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. subject: We hate to see you go.

body:
For the last 2 years, you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiou
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z38fa5jnhiufe6ctpelfin7ibe9hmros759hchrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1p1jclr64tj461hmdc30mdom8dhimlr30phk65gm8s3gmlj7aodmc2ob9p1kc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8q6cc5gmmq3fdj4copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm2p33clg62p724no)

---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn5lc1u2cthp01kbuijkhvtt4ld3l9dgsipa3l6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfsh5jj1gpneobhrcg72bbseprgb6pggd3d84av8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhp83rf1tcmiut4k1nh47pbr60jlk35johpdh3bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znd3cpo5aqb6u62ip1bo7t38621ua7k2fjnm7pvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z28r21r681aj3itgleag019pd49ovf4j64p4jdgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z31tql4dcujq4ffrssqaihdmo9r6fse4uql8irdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpdpjds3i518ht9cj1f8edn06374u0bv070vij1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh4j1cmspf76kul5v6fonudpagq008cilpl46ht0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chhmao31cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Nina Turner for Us
subject: We don’t have dark money groups waiting to swoop in and save the day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
As soon as Nina launched this campaign, dark money and outside interest groups started lining up against us.
#

Hello Somebody!
As soon as Nina launched this campaign, dark money and outside interest groups started lining up against us.
One dark money group that flooded our district with 7 figures worth of ads last time immediately endorsed our opponent once again — suggesting they’re ready to spend limitless sums to buy this seat once again.
That’s how our opponents will try to stop us. So we must be ready to respond. Their attacks and dark money cannot go unanswered.
There are no corporate lobbyists lining up to write max-out checks to Nina. And we don’t have a super PAC waiting to swoop in and save the day.
Instead, we have a movement of tens of thousands of people like you, and Nina is counting on all of us. So we are asking:
**[Will you please contribute $27 — or any amount you can afford — to our campaign today? The truth is, what we do in these early months of the campaign is absolutely critical to our success on election day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41494059/329054100/1088907945?refcode2=25a4389b-6d87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220206-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWE0Mzg5Yi02ZDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n17nK8I4aiOPA0tLyQ05jYwMtb3ojxpyAxIouElwxcY=)**
We need to get corporate money out of politics. It’s legal bribery. It’s corruption. Nina will fight for that.
Thank you,
Team Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41494060/329054101/1088907945?refcode2=25a4389b-6d87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220206-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWE0Mzg5Yi02ZDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n17nK8I4aiOPA0tLyQ05jYwMtb3ojxpyAxIouElwxcY=)**

subject: Protect our Second Amendment rights!
body:
You and Sheriff Joe both know that our Second Amendment is something that shall NOT be infringed by power-hungry politicians.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dyV-46yKVHQSfAgu1xygw9G9nMqDt9GfPYXO0aehVO9iYsuUqf5Q5ndllRlueEdA8EBMEAw5GQO0J1IK_BKF1o2YRG-JrugT9Xvgq-NtvVUPhaKPzIYopjIaxmQYVsbbg_l7nLJMVpk0T_KShI79350CluoJaQYzPlbDwEitltgDT8D2_042jeYjNh53KXOehuPRRAI3jnMar7pDlA08K-R2UQ8iJOID&c=6yqoobrjzpfPa-XTBd4uWgMrmZsZuiuoH2Z_G31ZR1lOwd_2s2uPbQ==&ch=bfJAmkOBGrZZrqnfVC_vB2dUyzjLILptsdlLWDHE_reB09pY-pzokA==)

| Peter,
You and Sheriff Joe both know that our Second Amendment is something that shall NOT be infringed by power-hungry politicians.
Joe's carried a gun on the job every day for the past three decades - you can bet he knows just how important this Constitutional right is for our state and country.
We value the Second Amendment here in Nevada... [But we need your help to show that support on important public petitions like this one.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dyV-46yKVHQSfAgu1xygw9G9nMqDt9GfPYXO0aehVO9iYsuUqf5Q5ndllRlueEdA8EBMEAw5GQO0J1IK_BKF1o2YRG-JrugT9Xvgq-NtvVUPhaKPzIYopjIaxmQYVsbbg_l7nLJMVpk0T_KShI79350CluoJaQYzPlbDwEitltgDT8D2_042jeYjNh53KXOehuPRRAI3jnMar7pDlA08K-R2UQ8iJOID&c=6yqoobrjzpfPa-XTBd4uWgMrmZsZuiuoH2Z_G31ZR1lOwd_2s2uPbQ==&ch=bfJAmkOBGrZZrqnfVC_vB2dUyzjLILptsdlLWDHE_reB09pY-pzokA==)
If you want our right to bear arms to be PROTECTED, sign on now and help us show our elected officials how we feel!

body:

That opportunity has arrived, and here at Unite the Country, we are ready for change. body:
This is a very personal story to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41495642/329062336/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmYzMjFjNS03NTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_nKI_zmml-UuTCU7vyBnLUm0y1A-faL44aOHLkBq4hI=)
---
Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman, honored to represent CA-41 in Congress -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? name: Team Kilmer
subject: Supporting our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our country and democracy. But many veterans face additional battles when they come home -- mental health struggles, PTSD, economic challenges, housing insecurity, and access to high-quality health care.

No one who has bravely served our country should have to worry about having a safe place to live or accessible, high-quality health care, but that's the reality for far too many veterans. Derek is committed to serving our veterans and has been leading the charge in Congress to ensure our veterans have the support they need.

Last month, he introduced the Planning for Aging Veterans Act to ensure older veterans can live a life with dignity and get the high-quality health care they deserve. Derek also introduced legislation to create new, transitional housing for veterans experiencing homelessness.

[**Derek has always been guided by the principle that we need to thank our veterans, not just with words, but with concrete action. Add your name if you agree we need to do more to support our veterans >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mdXiWgJx9K48BHYEuHJ6yzJSJAe_nr4aiYnrklIb27A=/FumHDNkwa_ZO7qCwcLa1pMugBupnmfG6o6MmqAZB978=?ms=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Every veteran should be able to live with dignity. Period.

Last month, the House passed two bipartisan bills geared toward supporting our veterans. Derek helped pass a bill that will ensure eligible service members are automatically enrolled in health care during their transition out of the military. And he proudly voted for the Guard and Reserve GI Bill Parity Act to make sure every day spent in uniform -- including training days -- counts toward vital GI Bill benefits.

[**America is the nation it is today because of the sacrifice of our veterans, and it 's unthinkable that veterans who have served our country are struggling. Sign on if you agree we need to do more to support our veterans.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mdXiWgJx9K48BHYEuHJ6yzJSJAe_nr4aiYnrklIb27A=/FumHDNkwa_ZO7qCwcLa1pMugBupnmfG6o6MmqAZB978=?ms=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220206_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/mdXiWgJx9K48BHYEuHJ6yzJSJAe_nr4aiYnrklIb27A=/mCJATk1JgEKAb-_eeq6AzOSe7v3Wq4N8yyxTdGOQGLo=?refcode=em22_220202_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220202_vets_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0pra51s8k6n9r9fqvcnma5ik89hlt4dse3mamho_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chjm0ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttkmipj4s5nc5irbdb2ephj7d746sob2tpn6iom8cdie5pnddhl64r6eo5kesoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phgmaqr0pti65j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztk1q1j1ut43v573pg66ju04sijjgf7ch3tmdpn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chjm0ob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvnpoecj51mlahrs4j5hmhlq2vdqhlb5k2ejt03g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chjm0ob4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbqf91kolemb2cfq2j6151676fasjabpfbllrgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chjm0ob4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497088/329069410/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODU0NjFmZC03ZTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ENXkBa7GzSOwIdbRWP-Wer6gj9ZMHgUm3PW14mt0CTQ=)

| | I’m no stranger to tough fights, friend. When I became Chief of Staff to President Obama’s auto task force, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: “Let Detroit go bankrupt” and “You’ll never save those jobs.” But we got organized, fought back, and ended up saving _two million_ jobs in the auto industry – 200,000 of which were right here in Michigan. While I loved working for the auto industry, I wanted to do more. I felt that I could make an even bigger impact, and do great things for my community. The decision I made to run for public office in 2017 ended up being one of the best decisions of my life. Don’t get me wrong, campaigning was never easy. From the minute I announced my campaign, skeptics doubted my ability to flip MI-11 blue. National Republicans spent millions against me. But I never gave up, and thanks to your support, I became the first Democrat elected to the district in nearly _100 years._ **I’ve loved every second serving as MI-11’s representative, which is why I’m running for re-election in 2022. I’m in for another tough race, but my work for the people of MI-11 is far from over.** [**Today, I’m asking if you will pitch in $25 or more to help our grassroots team meet our February goal. I would greatly appreciate any amount of support you can provide.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497089/329069411/1362122633?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220206_FR_AutoRescue_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODU0NjFmZC03ZTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ENXkBa7GzSOwIdbRWP-Wer6gj9ZMHgUm3PW14mt0CTQ=) | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497090/329069413/1362122633?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220206_FR_AutoRescue_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODU0NjFmZC03ZTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ENXkBa7GzSOwIdbRWP-Wer6gj9ZMHgUm3PW14mt0CTQ=)

clean_body: | = | | I’m no stranger to tough fights, friend. When I became Chief of Staff to President Obama’s auto task force, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: “Let Detroit go bankrupt” and “You’ll never save those jobs.” But we got organized, fought back, and ended up saving two million jobs in the auto industry – 200,000 of which were right here in Michigan. While I loved working for the auto industry, I wanted to do more. I felt that I could make an even bigger impact, and do great things for my community. The decision I made to run for public office in 2017 ended up being one of the best decisions of my life. Don’t get me wrong, campaigning was never easy. From the minute I announced my campaign, skeptics doubted my ability to flip MI-11 blue. National Republicans spent millions against me. But I never gave up, and thanks to your support, I became the first Democrat elected to the district in nearly 100 years. I’ve loved every second serving as MI-11’s representative, which is why I’m running for re-election in 2022. I’m in for another tough race, but my work for the people of MI-11 is far from over. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being in this with me. – Haley | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: I hope you'll give this a read – it's quite personal.
body:
Derek, this is a longer, but especially important, email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.

I was raised in Jacksonville, FL – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val — never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.

I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Please split a contribution of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220206_CGVA_Demings]

Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th district in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
Never tire, I said to myself, as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.

This is my story, Derek: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. Senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.

So I need your support, Derek. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is resources. The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and first Black woman senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please split a donation of $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and CommonGood right now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_vd?refcode=20220206_CGVA_Demings]

Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire.

Val Demings

(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0b5b28db-0e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/5f7cda43-7f87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdjZGE0My03Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7FMaXaeXsWzRBpDPmyW5Yn_waBWrFb36Ny8OMyQkwTk=&id=108609855 .
