name: V. Demings
subject: Please, let me explain, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm worried
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,481 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498007/329073944/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODhhMGRlMS04Mzg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzs4bOP-qDeNmdkPXTGQonf0e0WaypfosVh8zjwWYnA=)**

clean_body: I'm worried | | | I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, I'm still falling $7,481 short. Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment: I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, andCNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win. The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me personally. I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours. = Thank you for stepping up when it matters most. Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. name: Team Benson
subject: Just the facts, Firstname/Friend
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

You won't want to miss this:
Securing our elections
Protecting our democracy
Increasing efficiencies

This is what drives Jocelyn Benson every day.

As Michigan’s Secretary of State,
She has the dual responsibility of safeguarding our elections
And improving the services offered to Michigan citizens.

And she is delivering.

In 2021, average office visits were down to 20 min or less.
And 60 percent of services are done without an office visit.

Jocelyn is working tirelessly to make sure all Michiganders
Know the truth about our voting process
And know how to exercise their right to vote.

In 2020, Michigan had the most accurate and secure election in state history!
Now Jocelyn is up for reelection and we need you with us this November.

Michigan deserves another term with a Secretary of State
Who is willing to
fight back against conspiracy theorists and fake electors
Overcome political differences to get things done for us
And unite for a non-partisan coalition of truth

[Support Jocelyn’s Campaign]: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=020622

-Team Benson

To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6b0bd9bf-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/325eeca0-8787-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjVlZWNhMC04Nzg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0pztf5qqa1Vzz6nWnaKfdufGqv0R4JJWHBews1RXC0=&id=112210963

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
📎 attached
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498556/329079032/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNhZmUxMS04ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YrflQv_WsyXqSybMq--nlSAzhwUkwG9nSh7Nbj7Hl-Y=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and she's ready to fight for Iowa's families!

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well – we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have more than $32 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So will you help her raise another $10,000? Donate $5, or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498557/329079033/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNhZmUxMS04ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YrflQv_WsyXqSybMq--nlSAzhwUkwG9nSh7Nbj7Hl-Y=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498558/329079034/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk675-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNhZmUxMS04ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YrflQv_WsyXqSybMq--nlSAzhwUkwG9nSh7Nbj7Hl-Y=)

Deb and Jerry Finkenauer

name: Deb for Wisconsin
subject: Did you see Deb’s note last week?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
The health care fight is personal for Deb.

| Peter,

Did you get a chance to read Deb’s note about her brother Erik?

The health care fight for Deb isn’t just political — it’s personal. She understands the unique challenges western Wisconsin families face when it comes to health care.

You can read a little more about Erik and Deb’s story in the attached email, but first we want to ask: **[Can you donate $25 or whatever works for you before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498568/329079776/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)** | ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498569/329079777/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)****
---
Thank you,

Team McGrath
**\----------Forwarded message----------

From:** [deb.mcgrath@debmcgrathforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498570/329079778/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)
**Date:** Sun, Jan 30, 2022 at 6:02 PM
**Subject:** My brother, Erik
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498571/329079779/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)

Peter, in a moment, I am going to ask for **[your support for my campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498572/329079780/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)** But first, I hope you will allow me to explain why the work we are doing to win this open seat is so important.

When I was young, my brother was diagnosed with Hodgkin’s lymphoma. There was no care available in our hometown, so my father took him to Madison for treatment.

I learned how precious health care is, especially for people who struggle with accessibility and costs. My brother passed away at age 6, and I miss him to this day.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498573/329079781/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.fc0b9713-8987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzBiOTcxMy04OTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BAyc6qZiYEQm9TpMQESHmdsfR4APtdFBLe_VQz08GRM=)
**Peter, every single person in our country deserves access to affordable, accessible health care.** When just one person cannot access the care they need, we all suffer.

Too many Wisconsin families are still unable to access quality health care. The health care crisis is just one of many challenges facing our state and country right now

I am running for Congress because we need leaders who have the leadership, experience, and discipline to address the health care crisis, combat the pandemic, strengthen our national security, and so much more.

But I cannot get there alone. I know that if we can keep reaching voters with our message, we can win this open seat for the people of western Wisconsin. But we need 25 more grassroots donors to pitch in by midnight to stay on track.

clean_body: The health care fight is personal for Deb. | Peter, Did you get a chance to read Deb’s note about her brother Erik? The health care fight for Deb isn’t just political — it’s personal. She understands the unique challenges western Wisconsin families face when it comes to health care. You can read a little more about Erik and Deb’s story in the attached email, but first we want to ask: = | **= Thank you, Team McGrath \----------Forwarded message---------- From: = Date: Sun, Jan 30, 2022 at 6:02 PM Subject: My brother, Erik To: = Peter, in a moment, I am going to ask for = But first, I hope you will allow me to explain why the work we are doing to win this open seat is so important. When I was young, my brother was diagnosed with Hodgkin’s lymphoma. There was no care available in our hometown, so my father took him to Madison for treatment. I learned how precious health care is, especially for people who struggle with accessibility and costs. My brother passed away at age 6, and I miss him to this day. = Peter, every single person in our country deserves access to affordable, accessible health care. When just one person cannot access the care they need, we all suffer. Too many Wisconsin families are still unable to access quality health care. The health care crisis is just one of many challenges facing our state and country right now I am running for Congress because we need leaders who have the leadership, experience, and discipline to address the health care crisis, combat the pandemic, strengthen our national security, and so much more. But I cannot get there alone. I know that if we can keep reaching voters with our message, we can win this open seat for the people of western Wisconsin. But we need 25 more grassroots donors to pitch in by midnight to stay on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Together, we can make a difference, Deb | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. February 6, 2022 | Issue VI

### Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on the Redistricting Vote
---
The question of who represents New Yorkers in Albany and Washington is a matter that greatly affects our day-to-day lives. In 2014, and again last November, New Yorkers overwhelmingly voiced their support for an independent redistricting process to create fair, nonpartisan lines and ensure equal representation for all.
This week, Legislative Democrats shamelessly turned their backs on the will of New Yorkers by adopting legislation to create their own gerrymandered partisan districts after rejecting maps created by the Independent Redistricting Commission. They did so behind closed doors, without considering input from thousands of communities of interest or holding a single public hearing.
Democrats' hypocritical actions are blatant attacks on our democratic process. It is clear they are only concerned with holding onto their political power and cementing the disastrous One-Party Rule that has made New York less safe, less affordable, and less populated.

###

---

Leader Ortt sent hard-hitting letter to Governor Hochul pressing her on the cost, details, and lackluster results of a $159 million emergency fund meant to combat gun violence; questions the absence of resources given to law enforcement, DAs
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt recently sent a letter to Governor Kathy Hochul questioning critical spending details of a nearly-dry government fund meant to stem the scourge of gun violence in New York communities.
The letter raised serious concerns about where the taxpayer money has actually gone, in addition to the disparity of support and resources given to local police departments and District Attorneys throughout the state.
"Considering the size and scope of this massive expenditure of taxpayer dollars -- as well as the fact that gun violence and violent crime continue to plague cities across our state -- we are writing to request detailed information regarding how this money has been spent," wrote Leader Ortt.

Thank you to Fight Sport 716 for all the hard work in Niagara County! == == | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with |

#

"Tom Perez names former Baltimore City councilwoman Shannon Sneed as running mate in Maryland governor's race"

clean_body: | Hey y’all, how are you doing? Wanted to send you an important campaign update because as of tomorrow, we have just one week left until early voting begins in the Texas primary! That’s just one week to make sure every Texas voter knows why Mike is the best candidate to take on and defeat the worst Lieutenant Governor in the nation. Since launching this grassroots campaign, Mike has traveled 8,000+ miles across the state and we’ve spoken with one million Texans online, over the phone, by mail, and on the road about the issues affecting their families. But there still are a lot of undecided voters left and we need to reach them before they cast their votes! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’ll be honest, every single goal we set is a critical piece of our larger campaign plan, team. Mike isn't taking money from corporate PACs, and he doesn't have a nearly $25 million stockpile like Dan Patrick does. He’s relying on this grassroots team every step of the way. = = Thanks for stepping up when it matters most, Ali Ali S. Zaidi Campaign Manager Collier For Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498979/329081635/-2057546413?refcode=20220206_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTJlMGUwZS04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1azYg9_VVqm0wghJvQpqx1s2sc7FsUCqrlkKB119D4=) Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. **That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.** [**Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us reach our fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498980/329081636/2038802527?refcode=20220206_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTJlMGUwZS04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1azYg9_VVqm0wghJvQpqx1s2sc7FsUCqrlkKB119D4=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498981/329081637/-2057546413?refcode=20220206_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTJlMGUwZS04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1azYg9_VVqm0wghJvQpqx1s2sc7FsUCqrlkKB119D4=)
Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side. \-- Tim

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Where our candidates stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We knew that we had a tough fight ahead of us when we recruited five
working-class organizers to run against powerful, well-funded opponents.

Unfortunately, FEC numbers were just released and it’s looking like the
fight got tougher for our Justice Democrats slate. While our slate is
supported by grassroots small-dollar donors, corporate Democrats
strengthened their campaign war chests with contributions from the oil and
gas industry, Wall Street, and Big Pharma.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93174?refcode=em20220206-21848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]Take a look at how far behind on fundraising three of our JD candidates
are against their opponents, and chip in $3 to help us fuel
our primary campaigns.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93174?refcode=em20220206-21848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]Image depicting cash on hand for JDs vs incumbents

“Cash on hand” is how much money a campaign actually has in the bank, and
is a significant indicator of a campaign's chance at winning. We’re up
against incumbents with massive campaign war chests, but we also have a
track record of defeating corporate-backed Democrats, despite being
outspent and outraised.

In 2018, we recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to run for Congress and
built her campaign from scratch. She won, despite corporate machine
incumbent Joe Crowley having millions of dollars in cash on hand, and two
years later we did it again. Now we’re aiming to help our slate of
progressive candidates each take on the establishment and win in 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93174?refcode=em20220206-21848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]Help us continue to fight to elect game-changing candidates who will
work for our values in Congress by contributing $3 today.
Unlike the incumbents we’re up against, we don’t take a single dollar from
corporate PACs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93174?refcode=em20220206-21848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220206-21848-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21848_1203867_oLc6pH&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21848%2E1203867%2EoLc6pH

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Tobias
subject: 100 days out
body:
---
| | Dear Peter, Happy Sunday. We’ll keep this short so you can get back to it (frankly we want to as well). Today marks the 100 day mark before the primary election for Governor. Our chances of winning the general election are a lot less if we don’t win the primary. **That’s why it’s so critical that we elect Tobias: Oregonians are looking for a Governor who gets things done right the first time.** **[Your contribution of $10, $25, $100, or whatever you can do will make the difference on primary day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41498994/329082138/-2045037038?refcode=em020622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRkZWNjMC04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7NURvqkbBKONOhYfD8jSQhFHvDF5kwmHfZJmt0RFLo=)** The issues that Oregon’s next Governor needs to grapple with are daunting. We need a leader that is willing to engage with Oregonians on their kids’ schools, their housing, their jobs, and all of the other kitchen table issues, come up with solutions, and implement them. **Tobias will be that Governor.** **[Will you commit to a 100 days countdown contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499000/329082141/-2045037038?refcode=em020622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWRkZWNjMC04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m7NURvqkbBKONOhYfD8jSQhFHvDF5kwmHfZJmt0RFLo=)** Stay safe, Team Tobias

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Check out the results from our survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Last month, we asked this grassroots team to share what their top priorities were as we began the new year. The results are in, and we wanted to share what you had to say. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499027/329082256/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRkZWNjMC04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmywDFbbQg9mZZYaZSEDqwA_b-wR-htfFoy0KNf58TI=&emci=558fb619-e085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=daddecc0-8f87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last month, we asked this grassroots team to share what their top priorities were as we began the new year. The results are in, and we wanted to share what you had to say.

Combating climate change, getting dark money out of politics, protecting reproductive rights and expanding access to affordable health care were some of your top priorities: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499029/329082258/-1013040117?ms=em22_220206_result_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220206_result_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220206_result_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220206_result_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=iTkxCQUzgfL7tPKyC1a4ASKOn%2BLcGlUAPWRdzdHmIrKOxkq2hS5rh%2BNqXu2wbMincoGxPOvf5LhoN5sD4Q09MMiuQ307Zodjc9eWbZDHdWXa9JnfuK915UzRD9hzxr%2FwGfbrduR8GGhsvs7y6c8hvEWHaWZyZwEmuG961pbdNIY%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWRkZWNjMC04Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MmywDFbbQg9mZZYaZSEDqwA_b-wR-htfFoy0KNf58TI=&emci=558fb619-e085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=daddecc0-8f87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve. That's why last year, Kim held 16 town halls and drove over 5,400 miles across our district.

Surveys like this also help Kim better understand how to best represent your interests, and so we're grateful to everyone who took the time to share what issues they would most like to see addressed by Congress this year.

**[If you haven't had a chance to take our priorities survey yet, there's still time to share your thoughts with Kim. clean_body: Last month, we asked this grassroots team to share what their top priorities were as we began the new year. The results are in, and we wanted to share what you had to say. Peter, Last month, we asked this grassroots team to share what their top priorities were as we began the new year. The results are in, and we wanted to share what you had to say. Combating climate change, getting dark money out of politics, protecting reproductive rights and expanding access to affordable health care were some of your top priorities: Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve. That's why last year, Kim held 16 town halls and drove over 5,400 miles across our district. Surveys like this also help Kim better understand how to best represent your interests, and so we're grateful to everyone who took the time to share what issues they would most like to see addressed by Congress this year. | Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. name: Eddie Geller
subject: Scott Franklin doesn’t do his job. Literally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eddie Geller for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499190/329082805/380755282?refcode=gel_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFhNmUwOC05MDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvFOpojYo3RCTR-nB5R2L3sRDnLmZmVPL37zOGyAOgQ=)

| | Eddie Geller, former comedian, activist, and candidate for FL-15 here.

Call me old-fashioned, but I thought voting was one of the most important jobs of a US Representative?

So you can imagine my surprise when I found out that [ my MAGA opponent Scott Franklin missed more votes than 93% of other freshmen legislators!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499191/329082807/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220206_FR_MISSINGVOTES_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFhNmUwOC05MDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvFOpojYo3RCTR-nB5R2L3sRDnLmZmVPL37zOGyAOgQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499192/329082809/1783234547?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220206_FR_MISSINGVOTES_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFhNmUwOC05MDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvFOpojYo3RCTR-nB5R2L3sRDnLmZmVPL37zOGyAOgQ=) Voting on legislation is one of the most critical roles of a US Representative — it’s literally part of the job!

[But Rep. Franklin has missed over 7.5% of votes since taking office. That’s enough to make him the #4 most absentee freshmen Congressman!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499193/329082811/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220206_FR_MISSINGVOTES_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFhNmUwOC05MDg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvFOpojYo3RCTR-nB5R2L3sRDnLmZmVPL37zOGyAOgQ=)

body:
Should we get rid of Louis DeJoy to save the Postal Service?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=email_020622_2] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=email_020622_2]

His policies have prevented hard working Americans from receiving vital checks, medications, and even government notices.
He’s a relic of the Trump era and he’s got to go before he runs this public institution into the ground. We honestly can’t believe Biden let him stick around!

subject: Sen. Manchin should be EMBARRASSED!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Rachel Maddow just SLAMMED Joe Manchin for protecting the filibuster instead of saving the right to vote: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=6&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix) Maddow is ABSOLUTELY right. If Democrat Joe Manchin would’ve stepped up to ABOLISH the filibuster months ago, the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act would have passed in the Senate!

**Now, voting rights, our Congressional majorities, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda are on the verge of total collapse.**

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to STAND with us, and tell Joe Manchin to do what’s right and abolish the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=7&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=8&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=9&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: A Proud Democrat
DATE: February 6th, 2022

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

We need to have a serious talk.

For the last year, in state houses across the country, **Republicans have been doing their best to dismantle voting rights.**

**And now, Senate Republicans have BLOCKED the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act, which would protect voting rights at a national level!**

I’m enraged, Senator, so now, I’m personally demanding you step up, meet this moment, and ABOLISH the filibuster to finally SAVE voting rights!

[I’m dead serious – and to prove it, I’m giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project, an organization founded to protect the right to vote, right now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=10&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=11&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
The Republican war on our democracy isn’t over, Senator.

**In addition to trying to suppress voters, the GOP is trying to block every piece of legislation President Biden is trying to pass — putting the midterms at risk!**

The people of your state and our country deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and abolish the filibuster!

[So please, STAND UP, defend our right to vote and abolish the filibuster once and for all. I know I am, and I’ll show it with a $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=12&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=13&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A Proud Democrat_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5623?t=14&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1225%2E878179%2EM9jkix)

subject: It’s already hard to vote in Texas. Now it’s worse.
body:
Local officials in Texas are being forced to reject hundreds of vote-by-mail applications because of this. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499439/329083837/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDY0MjhlMC05MTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dhh0jNVfKiEyubDqWgFZ6uoMb2V8Jq7TIUDeTA9fmZc=)
Multiple counties in Texas have rejected hundreds of vote-by-mail applications due to confusion over new ID requirements in the newly passed Texas GOP legislation, S. B. 1. Local officials are being forced to reject mail-in ballot applications when ID information on the applications does not match the identification number used on the original voter registration application. **Most voters don’t remember if they used their driver’s license or Social Security number, having registered to vote years or even decades ago — leading to so many rejections. ** **[We must fight back. With the March 1 primary just weeks away, we need your help to get Democrats to the polls. Can you make a $5 contribution today to help Donna get this important message to Texans so they can overcome these new Texas restrictions on voting by mail?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41499440/329083838/-780221392?refcode=pl_20220206_01&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDY0MjhlMC05MTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dhh0jNVfKiEyubDqWgFZ6uoMb2V8Jq7TIUDeTA9fmZc=)** The Democrats in the Texas State legislature tried to warn us this would happen. name: Mikayla Ridley
subject: Our final decision after seeing NY’s new congressional districts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress
body:
| |
---
Peter, ** ** This week the New York State Legislature proposed new lines for 2022 congressional districts, and those lines are expected to pass and go into effect. These new district lines have led to a long, in-depth conversation on the Ridley for Congress team. Updated district lines put my home in the new NY-19, a district currently represented by Congressman Antonio Delgado. As my team and I deliberated and decided what to do with this new information, we talked about our principles as well as our policy stances: We talked about the fact that, in a district with over 770,000 people, no candidates should be running unopposed--not even in the primaries--because democracy thrives on choices. We talked about the need for dramatic healthcare reform and a national single-payer system to fix our skyrocketing healthcare costs. We talked about the need for real progressive economic changes in Congress, from the Green New Deal to full student debt cancellation to universal childcare to increasing taxes on the billionaire class. We also talked about the realities of the 2022 race and our current political system. We talked about how we would be challenging an incumbent with over $5 million in his campaign bank account for advertising and outreach. We talked about how, in this brand new district, we would need to reach tens of thousands of new constituents across thousands of square miles of new territory, all in a matter of just a month or two in order to collect signatures and get on the ballot. We talked about how the only way to get that kind of attention that quickly without significant advertising money would be through slander and divisive attacks, which would not help anyone and which we firmly did not want to do. And, finally, we talked about how Congressman Antonio Delgado is a genuinely good man. From everything I have seen, I am more progressive than him on many issues, but there is also a lot that we agree on. And it is clear from his record and his communication with the district that he is not a bad politician. He is not fearmongering and spreading lies to keep his power. He is not ignoring his constituents to advance his own agenda. He is a well-respected and dedicated public servant for Upstate New York. And, if he does ultimately get reelected for a third term in NY-19, I know that he will serve our new district with grace and work towards the best interests of our community. With all of that in mind, today I am withdrawing my candidacy for Congress for the 2022 election cycle. I am immeasurably grateful for the support we have received thus far, and--even though I will not seek elected office this year--I will continue to be a tireless advocate for the changes we need in Congress to build a stronger, brighter, and more equitable future for our country. One final note regarding our reminding campaign funds: **** **** Throughout our campaign, we have raised just shy of $9,000, and all of that funding came from donors who were passionate about either unseating Claudia Tenney or working to create a more progressive and diverse Congress that better represents the needs of all Americans, not just the wealthy few. And we know many of our donors were passionate about both of those goals. **** **** Most of our fundraising so far has gone to the costs of running a congressional campaign from website design to communications to staffing to promotional materials and advertisements. But, like most campaigns, we are not ending with a completely empty bank account. And we want to make sure that our remaining funds will go towards the purpose they were originally intended for: **** **** In that spirit, we will be splitting our remaining funds in two and reallocating that roughly $1,500 to two sources: **** **** Half of our remaining funds will go to the Democratic challenger in the district Claudia Tenney is now running in: NY-23. It is not clear yet who that challenger will be so we will follow up once we know more about that district's race **** **** Half of our remaining funds will go to Matriarch, a grassroots political organization specifically dedicated to getting more progressive working women--especially LGBTQ+ and BIPOC women--elected to Congress and all levels of local and state government. Those interested in getting involved can learn more about their movement at MatriarchPAC.com **** **** We thank all of our donors for their financial support, and we thank all of our volunteers who have donated countless hours to help spread our message and advance our progressive movement. Every person who was involved with our campaign--whether you donated money, donated time, or simply shared our message--has made a difference for our community. And none of us are done fighting to make our country a better place for the next generation. **** **** In solidarity and with gratitude, Mikayla Ridley and the whole Ridley for Congress team
---
Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20De=20Gregorio?=
subject: OP-ED: De Gregorio Says No More Stock Trading in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICK DE GREGORIO FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Read here | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nickfornj/stockoped?e=31104c58a7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Op-Ed: It’s time for Josh Gottheimer, the rest of Congress to stop trading stocks
February 3, 2022
[SaveJersey.com](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=226bd4eb99&e=31104c58a7) As a Marine who served in war zones for limited pay, I was always disgusted that many of our public “servants” back home in Washington were using insider information to make millions of dollars in the stock market while regular Americans struggled to get by. That is not public service, it is a public sham. When I returned home from Afghanistan, I went back to school on the GI Bill and eventually found a job at a bank. It was an entry-level position, but even at the bottom of the corporate ladder, I had major restrictions placed on me when I wanted to buy or sell stock. It made a lot of sense: with more information than the average American at my fingertips, it would not have been fair for me to make certain investments and profit where others could not. The information I had at the bank pales in comparison to the information Washington elites have at their disposal. And yet, they trade freely and shamelessly. Nancy Pelosi recently refused to hold a vote on bipartisan legislation that would have placed stock restrictions on our elected officials. My opponent, Josh Gottheimer, must have breathed a sigh of relief. Despite a salary of $174,000 as a representative of the Fifth Congressional District, [Josh bought and sold over $60 million in call options last year](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=fde8a5c270&e=31104c58a7). Not $60 million in his lifetime. Not $60 million during his six years in Congress. But $60 million last year alone. And now, it has come to light that Josh has been [creating pop-up fundraising committees to funnel private equity money into his campaign coffers](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=1354ec7232&e=31104c58a7). Where is the honesty, the integrity, and the transparency that we, his constituents, deserve? I believe service is sacrifice. I believe that politicians who make tens of millions of dollars in Washington while claiming to represent the American public during a period of runaway inflation are not simply a “part” of the problem; they are the problem. Last month, I signed a pledge to fully divest myself of all stocks if I am elected to Congress. This basic promise of transparency is the bare minimum a candidate should be able to guarantee his or her constituents. **I therefore call on Josh Gottheimer to immediately cease his self-serving trading schemes and sign my divestment pledge. I strongly encourage my primary opponents Frank Pallotta and Fred Schneiderman to follow my lead as well.** This is the least we can do to restore honor and trust to the position we all aspire to hold.

_NICK DE GREGORIO is a veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan, and is currently a candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth District. A Bergen County native, he lives in Fair Lawn with his wife and two young children._
---

name: Letitia James
subject: Let's make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500031/329086991/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzE1NGJkMS05ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNaQVGtduDMVWXyW0S2WVaQjHryzf3IOl139pLUuZds=)
Peter,

History is being made as we speak: An unprecedented 440 bills gutting our access to the ballot box are being passed across the country. **This is a blatant attack on our voting rights – especially for those in Black and brown communities – in an attempt to silence us.**
Luckily, we can still rewrite it if we act together – now. With the 2022 elections fast approaching, and the wealthiest and most powerful interests in this country fighting tooth and nail to muzzle us and our campaign, it's vital that we speak out loudly – today, _together_ – to right the path of history for justice and equality before it's too late.

**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you donate $5, $10, whatever you can spare to fuel my campaign for re-election? As your attorney general, I will continue to use the law to strike down these attacks on our right to vote. With your support today, we can make history together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500036/329086996/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzE1NGJkMS05ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNaQVGtduDMVWXyW0S2WVaQjHryzf3IOl139pLUuZds=)**
I made history by becoming the first Black woman elected to a statewide office in New York. But that distinction is nothing more than a footnote in the history books if I don't use the full extent of this office to hold powerful and wealthy interests – historically the loudest voices in this country – firmly accountable.
That's why I'm running for re-election as your attorney general: Not because I want to make history myself, but because I know that if I continue fighting on behalf of hardworking, everyday New Yorkers like you, we can make history together.
**There is still so much work to be done, and we won't be able to make history again with my re-election if I don't have fearless fighters like you by my side.[Please, before 11:59 p.m., will you chip in to this campaign to continue our vital work for equality and justice in the name of a history we can be proud of?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500037/329086997/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzE1NGJkMS05ODg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rNaQVGtduDMVWXyW0S2WVaQjHryzf3IOl139pLUuZds=)**

name: Cynthia Mendes
subject: COVID protection for all!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Imagine if every week you went to your mailbox and received a free COVID-19 test and high quality mask for each member of your household. And imagine if our unhoused neighbors weren’t left out of these programs, and could access these resources at shelter | | | Hi Friend, Over the course of the pandemic, **Rhode Island has had more cases per capita than**** _every other state_****in the country.** What’s so painful about this reality is that it didn’t have to be this way. Imagine instead if Governor McKee and State House leadership had acted quickly, using just a fraction of the state’s massive budget surplus and $1.1 billion in federal funds on common-sense solutions to keep people safe. **Imagine if every week you went to your mailbox and received a free COVID-19 test and high quality mask for each member of your household.** And imagine if our unhoused neighbors weren’t left out of these programs, and could access these resources at shelters across the state. That’s exactly what I’m fighting for our state to do. I’m introducing a bill to the state Senate that would mail free tests and N-95 masks to residents each week. **[Can you add your name to our petition calling on Governor McKee and Senate leadership to support this bill to send free COVID-19 tests and masks to all Rhode Islanders?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmoMwUtcg8noZmdS0JU4N2y_9cwU0T5RgV7e7gje3pY7T5ZoWcJ5r5uAkKv_PiLO7Y0NqJLaDuDdhMgUbIzwdbIZYlVtWPQFYkLKMM8CXfo0CPKjFM9MZPtcuJwOy8FMbjzEZ7bxIelUtr76YDcJv1TotmyK5bRXD7ux588uB8fM7-kBK3d5LoC9UinjUztxDcukRdUy6KHZm__FbGrtXmwiyXXhdpyowou54HGuRvazKCmCH4AE5NCzzr9lvljx9A/3jc/o5k7dT19TACSYdfbBlO1xw/h0/5ROu5tp-zxZScDZK6JUsnUr2I4RPy75Nkav2s4-eL2w)** We can’t afford to continue to let the pandemic run rampant across our state, and if the pandemic has taught us anything, it’s that none of us are healthy unless _all_ of us are! That’s why Matt and I also support building a Medicare for All style healthcare system and a vaccine mandate. Friend, having your name on the **[petition](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmoMwUtcg8noZmdS0JU4N2y_9cwU0T5RgV7e7gje3pY7QCFsFqD80h4YDN8Oo2w50sicuDp0A5KhmuHEhRxXBewWwsuwvr20sg06qyPramdZv5CIE-WIz9tPxeN6mdVWhioDaZIAZCCBJ53EDu23FSgTY0C_oupGIVt6kjqaNG-74adF4ZjoYT7LxGLjCSOMZ81849FQrJ2sYHE0JQGVjZT33v5XX8lzE9eI_47pSLiaGmmXz3zseDNCDiSxkC8a24/3jc/o5k7dT19TACSYdfbBlO1xw/h1/qWN3AOd4_3lflVz3RoLgT7_X1q_PIUW7JUomagfO-BI)** would be a huge help as I advocate for this bill at the State House. I’ve seen families and communities work tirelessly to support and care for each other throughout the pandemic. We need to demand the same from our state’s leaders. Grateful & Hopeful, Cynthia PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906 **[www.mattandcynthiaforri.com](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXX-zNT5h0qL38vFUVo1i5CvVVwJ6YyJLp2Fu3LxsMV1jRmIpAFeZen97eXK8rQGy2YK-aBMQzsk1Ue44BbDx9YFNPmtwUXTQQ2ZosO3Mvl0XQ_-_NVyb71J0pVwH4AUv0i79LdpD8DzGFBpPuQ9d-a0fb_7MkSBNlsDf4f_BwftX9CFPsNR2s-QqjQE6ckL-wWJq_l_CbG4--jbNHGrBEjUNT7DDGP4RWz_GAPcwjLNo4ArDTgvD2Kp1hYgdlt61QIGTyKfLHnASMeRxVxXSypGwIbNCVm0YK233SNDq3qrB/3jc/o5k7dT19TACSYdfbBlO1xw/h2/bk3lle8OgH2C2mLlwmO-WL00Ha-lREKy6jfZoLsmYB8) | [info@mattandcynthiaforri.com](mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXX-zNT5h0qL38vFUVo1i5CvVVwJ6YyJLp2Fu3LxsMV1jz02xy7obeK-RjpUe8GhulRno0ESbXEzqlzlJA2BvP76kJ20bzC6C59Jwomos7GJvCaLZOatkhfwlyD5_DCt4-KB8N9NjCARuy0GhdlLHKuVXa1q-wAw6Fgth2YHTENImB9bEzLaa1g5CcPih6_42zNx3BxU_lM2ePw49iUGh5PngFEOUfwtHOwkkhMy-LOlHnltm_aW0R04Hm3sDirdOQ4--AZ3JpbJgsWDerBykVeStwQ6ohgZiUkp18LAs9WZn/3jc/o5k7dT19TACSYdfbBlO1xw/h3/iEHE9J45t1JoV9vmp9KredkJ1CKunWivJ9h4nRP0K5M)** | Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Matt and Cynthia for RI, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GBRaU49nrZp5PheswVdBScTMcWTbWwCsCs-F52BL-_7uRMggh_gjDcbyFlWOmcvIVbxZk4q8hjjHrQxh1HPmL-553zH-0S75e7XzfAEGvcLGs5WGTiyf3lvUTAl7QC1KtlxKYbiBB_hBdPmcTY0CwfTmNbY3VO9D2hFaa-24FM4sv8B3RgMMwteY5nunfCxtNYRpAlh-0LR3gkP1TAnEadg/3jc/o5k7dT19TACSYdfbBlO1xw/h5/d7NExynm1Gr4Y-75YdP59diU_bhtZgLrfMmlSZaJntc).

This month, we uplift, honor, recognize and celebrate the history and lives of Black Americans — but we must be centering that focus every day in our work year-round, not just the shortest month of the year. [**That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between the NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund, Movement for Black Lives, and the NAACP Kings & Tulare County. 100% of your contribution will go directly to the important work these organizations do to advance racial justice every single day.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zUI5eQ_8M9tE8C_TD2oRjabHSTrmluaHd40DGzWO9zzhyFbnkSRPQAf7ILKrMsQGBJqElNKoVk432NC6KEkvxbpQG2TThDKzTmtQ2V3DnM8LcTPuTUDoVNd3ie0kboR84yWwszYkeCq-vUKnqpgy5Lc84OBjK6uEeTYSrEbF-7q9d_Ok4uJVH1wQ7X_fLGYXED60Ig01DA7fQOZlYP5HA_0dzyxI44NEYjT25WvIysBh6y3Tsxm-yyj7mqk3cVR_I5ISIkb_DXbWubl-xlQ0LLO2qkokqANDzLoyVCjDD3zgUPerv56GYbbMOCcMS-7P3uaUk-oG8acqvtEC1A1CJx3GEAB58LMNaS1ncIs-cX4YLr7GPBuS0AUKO5Jmca0es/3jc/xEowjAleRqOMGMpiXh1ovw/h1/WXklhbYJcF_PTv8rmMF1gK3trY_YoVKiQ8JqWakDGC0) [Split your contribution »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zUI5eQ_8M9tE8C_TD2oRjabHSTrmluaHd40DGzWO9zzhyFbnkSRPQAf7ILKrMsQGDUTNPoptUlZCY99KcoE6CuelaumVYKWSwoVuiHViFW_ns7D3CIuTtF1DOwheQipOYjn3Qex8CCDcS_QNnioNJzvuXvHYZAnGuSDhlgGJwVlUB7QG8gZtVRJQtUTaUNFxlKvnddoqDOVXBIqBMWnqdyvCva7QVlcA_i79k2AXmDgo6lpfB7Bwi3_hoT3oLRQsiZmvZlKydjzjaDgr4SaazDSQrbHHVdMFzeIoSeuJ4kc1NbNQgeycpcLWSAv4_WXmZR891ubezMfvvuHp277MuzfdS61zssng4LUvFgG_WmXdFfrQtg3m-oKzHmtLpQMnI/3jc/xEowjAleRqOMGMpiXh1ovw/h2/W2DKcGws7Iid9gGIAjkK2jz0L_8UZg6bW1KvTAKx19E) When we talk about the history of Black Americans, we also must recognize and focus on the consistent and systematic ways in which Black people have been denied access and equity. When I talk about fighting against racial and economic disparities, it’s because these gaps are all too real. Politicians shouldn’t say empty words about celebrating this month and then work to keep suppressing the votes of Black people, stopping legislation that would help Black families who have been disproportionately targeted by a system never set up to welcome them in the first place, and talking about banning the discussion of the very real history our country in schools. I know I have work to do in my own journey of anti-racism and that words mean little without action. That’s why I wanted to include a simple action that you can take to help support national and local Black-led efforts to advance racial justice — while acknowledging that this should not be reserved for just one month out of the year. **Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Look, I’m sorry to be so abrupt. But my opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist and one of the most extreme Republicans running for Congress anywhere in the country. That’s why Donald Trump endorsed him.

And we just found out he outraised us last quarter. He’s raised over $2,000,000 to defeat me.

clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Fellow Conservative, What if I told you we have a chance to... ...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate? ...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia? ...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate? What if I told you we can do ALL THREE? That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker. From crushing it on the college and professional football fields to owning a successful business and being a spokesman for an organization that provides mental health services for our troops, Herschel Walker has done just about everything. Now, he's taking on his next challenge and facing his biggest race yet by running for Senate. We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraising senator in the entire country. In fact, he raised $9.8 million in the past three months alone! If we're going to help Herschel win in Georgia and flip the Senate Majority red, he's going to need the critical resources to fund his campaign. That's where you and I come in. My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. Tho
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3h6mbfbq3jsbi30e185r4edktrlu80si7lnbi68_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chge6or2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdlcoobcp36ejjb6d9gelg6edliedhb7ddimdj78c9mcqr76tb0sqoj9cj6c9rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phgmsqj6ptie9j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpamgdvjbt56a5d294uqh91oshkrvknl8j6vkrl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chge6or2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3kdcpo3ig3bo1p00d7590mhu4ltssq48qstqeng_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chge6or2cdh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbftr8alu5ol16eclp2if14hk9mha26gv54u5uug_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chge6or2cdh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbt0210n4pko8oov152k6c8kfp4u05srr6m1rjuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chge6or2cdh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Outraised by Abbott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
New campaign finance reports just dropped in Texas. Here’s what they show:
#
We just filed our latest mandatory campaign finance report. So did Greg Abbott. Unfortunately, the numbers show that he out-fundraised us.
**Jan. 1-20** | **Raised**
---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $1.3 million
Greg Abbott | $1.4 million
**We can’t afford to be outraised again.** Especially when Abbott now has over $62 million on hand. That’s why we’re asking for your help to pick up our pace so we can close the gap and flip Texas with so much on the line.
**[Will you chip in $3 right now to help us take on Greg Abbott? We have another mandatory deadline coming up on February 19th before our primary, and we need to ensure that we outraise Abbott this time around.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52338?refcode=ema20220206-174732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=174732%2E444211%2EZb6ANM)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52338?refcode=ema20220206-174732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=174732%2E444211%2EZb6ANM)**
While we were behind on the total money raised this time around, there was some positive news for us that says a lot about how we’re running this campaign. We had 28,600 contributions during the first 20 days of the new year — outpacing Abbott by more than 9,000 donations. This shows that far more of our support is coming from grassroots donors.
There are more of us than Abbott’s megadonors. **[If you can, please add your first donation to help us close the gap and defeat Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52338?refcode=ema20220206-174732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=174732%2E444211%2EZb6ANM)**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220206-174732-footer&t=22&refcode2=174732_444211_Zb6ANM&akid=174732%2E444211%2EZb6ANM)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Your petition signature is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Can you help get John’s name on the ballot?
#
**Derek, we need your help.**
As you may know, candidates running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania are required to submit a bare minimum of 2,000 petition signatures in order to appear on the ballot.
That’s why Team Fetterman is launching a *huge* 67 Counties push to collect more than enough signatures to secure John Fetterman’s spot on the 2022 Democratic primary ballot.
[**_We need your signature, and we need your help! Will you complete our volunteer interest form to let us know how you can help get John’s name on the ballot?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220206-4473&t=1&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)
**[Sign Up](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220206-4473&t=2&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)**
Our goal is to collect as many signed nomination petitions from PA voters as possible to ensure validity and get John’s name on the 2022 Democratic primary ballot. **There are a lot of ways you can help make a direct and immediate impact:**
* Sign a nomination petition
* Circulate a petition
* Host a Petition Party
* Be a Petition Captain in your County

[**_So, can we count on your help? Let us know how you can contribute, and we’ll send you the next steps to get started._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220206-4473&t=3&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)
**[Sign Up](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220206-4473&t=4&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)**
We’re so grateful to have your help getting John’s name on the ballot!
— Team Fetterman
**PLEASE NOTE: The petition period is planned to start on February 15, 2022 with petitions due on March 8, 2022. However, it is possible that these dates may change due to statewide redistricting.**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220206-4473-footer&t=5&refcode2=4473_434096_Us7j2_&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4473%2E434096%2EUs7j2_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My friend, Susie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is a battleground seat Democrats can't afford to lose.
| | |
---
Friend, I have a critical update:

**Right now, experts at Cook Political Report say that the GOP is favored to retake Democrats' razor-thin House majority. That's why we need all hands on deck to defend _every last_ battleground seat – which includes Congresswoman Susie Lee's seat right here in Nevada.**
If you'll allow me just a moment, I want to share why Susie is in this fight and why she needs our help. **[Or, you can rush a donation now to help Susie keep her critical swing district blue in November – and the House majority along with it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500608/329090092/-1600720767?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1624-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRelMwtJOY6fCMpU-n7Wt7XktzAdIxRZ6zCii3SfrtM=)**
Susie grew up in a working-class family as one of eight kids. Her father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant, and her mother had her hands full raising Susie and her siblings.
When she was young, both of her parents were denied health coverage because of pre-existing conditions. Her mom suffered a heart attack just one month before she qualified for Medicare, and her parents nearly lost their home as the medical bills piled up.

**Susie knows how important it is to fight for issues like health care and child care because those issues impacted her family, too.** She saw firsthand how hardworking families can only succeed when institutions uplift _everyone_ – not just those at the top.
So when she first ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada, her mission was to fight for all working families. And she _won_. But now, she's facing a tough reelection against the GOP and its megadonor allies – who are prepared to spend whatever it takes to flip the House red in November.
**That's why I promised Susie that this team could raise $15,000 by midnight tonight to help her fight back. So please, if you care about defending the House majority for Democrats and making progress for working families, ****[will you rush $5 or more right now to help Susie Lee keep Nevada blue and defend the House for Democrats? Every dollar makes a difference in such a crucial battleground race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500609/329090093/-1600720767?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1624-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRelMwtJOY6fCMpU-n7Wt7XktzAdIxRZ6zCii3SfrtM=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500610/329090094/-1600720767?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1624-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRelMwtJOY6fCMpU-n7Wt7XktzAdIxRZ6zCii3SfrtM=)

clean_body: This is a battleground seat Democrats can't afford to lose. | | | Friend, I have a critical update: Right now, experts at Cook Political Report say that the GOP is favored to retake Democrats' razor-thin House majority. That's why we need all hands on deck to defend every last battleground seat – which includes Congresswoman Susie Lee's seat right here in Nevada. If you'll allow me just a moment, I want to share why Susie is in this fight and why she needs our help. = Susie grew up in a working-class family as one of eight kids. Her father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant, and her mother had her hands full raising Susie and her siblings. When she was young, both of her parents were denied health coverage because of pre-existing conditions. Her mom suffered a heart attack just one month before she qualified for Medicare, and her parents nearly lost their home as the medical bills piled up. Susie knows how important it is to fight for issues like health care and child care because those issues impacted her family, too. She saw firsthand how hardworking families can only succeed when institutions uplift everyone – not just those at the top. So when she first ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada, her mission was to fight for all working families. And she won. But now, she's facing a tough reelection against the GOP and its megadonor allies – who are prepared to spend whatever it takes to flip the House red in November. That's why I promised Susie that this team could raise $15,000 by midnight tonight to help her fight back. So please, if you care about defending the House majority for Democrats and making progress for working families, = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks so much for stepping up to help, Jacky Rosen | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. body:
Hello – I wanted to take a minute today to tell you about my dad
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500614/329090099/-1829049351?refcode=jtk636-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfwPg698J6x1GEVHQLS9jVxseN5iGFEZRq0_dBPKE_o=)
---
Hello – I wanted to take a minute today to tell you about my dad.
My dad was a WWII veteran who survived the Battle of the Bulge. He came back determined to make sure that our country was ever worthy of the sacrifice he had seen on the battlefield. When I was young, he used to look over the corner of his newspaper at the breakfast table and ask my siblings and me, “What are you doing for freedom today?”
That’s a big question for three kids who are just trying to finish their cereal before the school bus arrives, but it’s one I think about to this day – and make a point to answer.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500615/329090100/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk636-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfwPg698J6x1GEVHQLS9jVxseN5iGFEZRq0_dBPKE_o=)
I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could and to ensure that all Americans have the opportunity to succeed. It’s been my honor to serve Granite Staters in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for the issues that matter most, from lowering the cost of prescription drugs to helping families afford child care.
**My last race was decided by just 1,017 votes. So if we don't respond to the GOP's relentless attacks, it could mean the difference between winning or losing this crucial Senate seat.[Please, can you make a donation of $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500616/329090101/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk636-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfwPg698J6x1GEVHQLS9jVxseN5iGFEZRq0_dBPKE_o=)**

| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41500617/329090102/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk636-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmM5ZDgzNi1hMTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfwPg698J6x1GEVHQLS9jVxseN5iGFEZRq0_dBPKE_o=)

Maggie Hassan

Team,

Redistricting was always one of the biggest unknowns for our campaign. We didn't know if we would end up in a redder district, a bluer one, or hell, drawn into a new one entirely!

**It's why we've been waiting to hire a field team and open up Hahn headquarters (HQ) - we couldn't plan too far ahead without a map.**

Now that we know where our new district lines are, and how winnable our seat is, we've got to act quickly to introduce new voters to Kara, get our message out, and ensure every Democrat knows how crucial it is to flip this seat and defend our House majority.

> _"They are saying the new lines create a 1st District that Biden carried by 11 points, but that’s on the basis of how those people felt and voted in November 2020. If you look at how they felt and voted a year later, in November 2021, that’s a very different story."_

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Making history and making a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
I’m a 7th generation South Carolinian. | | | Hi friend, As we celebrate Black History Month I want to tell you a little about my history: I’m a 7th generation South Carolinian and the daughter of a public school teacher. My family is just like any other. We laugh together, love each other, and tell stories to remember our history. I remember hearing stories about the way my family founded a business in Bennettsville that still stands today. My family’s history and support helped grow me into someone who deeply values my home. **I’m running for Governor of South Carolina because I believe our future can be brighter than our history. I want my sons to build families here, to pass on stories and our shared history. I want this state to be a place where we can continue to flourish — a place to be proud of.** South Carolina has never had a Black woman Governor, but I knew when we started this campaign that we could make history. That’s a responsibility I cherish, but I’m not just running for Governor to make history — I’m running to make a difference. **[Will you join me? Chip in $20.22 or whatever amount you’re able to help me make history and make a difference for ALL South Carolinians.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW9tx3PihHlnZ7xH4IUvUZh66jXQ55j6EYRQwWKlG7J-lKkYMjNN3uzhNxNBaVkjhl8_cLIiVee-6hbPYw0-uWlsyl5xKYwQrQyk921dSY3J9LBm-2JiTTZ59zedKNjPfFy0K6PCsR0XzYVp-Rtuwd8J4qFYO9Q0OH85rFz2NcyKSmbLcmm3yBPCT0fXdqjeBgpvuKTiLXVqBAmstnLHsap1OKKX0YLVBDH8i6kyXxN43bJG5c5jRVNL3Ym8bxRc8Wp1-bW4dWR13liE5WZYDKR82k_Nzo6058acbYTn3hAg7zgfZvvIDzbjm8ILaqdgVwnhTfL88Sp6LXO_0yBqKWkTfxGr5MjDu1FMcrz4nxTC7/3jc/mcI_CWuGQKaPVPNWSjeTeQ/h0/ER4iy_R4c4bDRkzdGc6dc7lOii2tgnzt4B7sstGbIUc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6pJAb5hrkufJ9bVGTSyzWW9tx3PihHlnZ7xH4IUvUZh66jXQ55j6EYRQwWKlG7J-lA8FU-DbGAscuXtnNSf9kmIl5nYChMNI3WXw9P810zPiImbO08ZkvnCNcohKj3SIHGV4U8FKkzQOUKqZ4EOGOnRdP9k2178E_8AzO76KhrGOJ0CjiNSSXYzGdKcvEc_lCxMf7uC8yGuhoR5WAUTGeeKxQSTA6lKr2sOb24tgcJbVxiPEe2QE3jGag4r3IvN9TUQPO2fWsRCWCdRwyBh5P2JSF-_AQTwC4DLAxIjXykvgF3fmZFsDsCh37o8XKdrUlF_i3E9bqOpV6e6PLZgXHU3lZ5V-iSRFVgEV_gaetpVzOXCKDAJxdS8a8HU9kVkc9o1XwAWdkM0CYOXK8xWo7pA/3jc/mcI_CWuGQKaPVPNWSjeTeQ/h1/jgVwlsMQqgiDnz7H7o-bhHdewDNmggcqAXoUtOOZS0w)
