clean_body: I’m a 7th generation South Carolinian. | | | Hi friend, As we celebrate Black History Month I want to tell you a little about my history: I’m a 7th generation South Carolinian and the daughter of a public school teacher. My family is just like any other. We laugh together, love each other, and tell stories to remember our history. I remember hearing stories about the way my family founded a business in Bennettsville that still stands today. My family’s history and support helped grow me into someone who deeply values my home. I’m running for Governor of South Carolina because I believe our future can be brighter than our history. I want my sons to build families here, to pass on stories and our shared history. I want this state to be a place where we can continue to flourish — a place to be proud of. South Carolina has never had a Black woman Governor, but I knew when we started this campaign that we could make history. That’s a responsibility I cherish, but I’m not just running for Governor to make history — I’m running to make a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . name: Erica Smith
subject: My rural roots run deep
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

It’s Erica
Smith. My roots run deep in rural North Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38085?t=1001&akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl ][IMG]

My five siblings and I were raised on a dirt road — the same dirt road
that our mother was raised on. My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on
a family farm in rural North Carolina. The rural way of life still runs
through my veins.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38085?t=1002&akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl ][IMG]

Even now, I spend my time doing what I’ve done since I was a little girl—
proudly harvesting corn and picking cucumbers on the family farm!

I understand the dignity of work. I know what it means to struggle, to
work all day to put food on the table for your family. And in fact, the
struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families
face today.

We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re
fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.
I’m running for Congress in NC-02 because this is my family’s home, my
ancestors home, and my home.

NC-02 needs someone who understands the needs of our people, families and
communities. I know I’m that person for my district, but I can’t do this
alone. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38085?t=1004&akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl ]Can you make
your first donation to our campaign for U.S. House right now? Our campaign
depends on folks like you reading and chipping into emails like this to
power our grassroots movement.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38091?refcode=em20220206-845&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl ]Donate $5

Thank you for hearing my story,

Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. House

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220206-845-footer&t=1024&refcode2=845_3698__Z5Ypl&akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=845%2E3698%2E_Z5Ypl

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

| | Hello California Green Party! Today I am collecting more signatures for the Petition In Lieu of Payment and those signatures count for the necessary 60 registered voter signatures to get on the ballot. In Short, I need 60 signatures to get on the ballot! In the middle of a Pandemic! I sent out a local call to meet me at a park, collect a few signatures more. With the Help of Individual donation from Green Party Members, I am less than $200 shy of the $3,480 to pay the Filing Fees. Thank You! Go Green Party! and thank you for helping a Green Get on the Ballot! Very Sincerely, Henk. Email: Sunday, February 6th, 2022 11:30 AM Green Party of Humboldt County, please stop by the Sequoia Park for 5 minutes and sign my Petition In Lieu Of Filing Fee. I will have fresh pens and petitions. I will be masked for your protection. Help a Green Party Candidate get on the Ballot for US Senate. I have raised nearly $3,300 of the $3,480 needed to pay the filing fees. I will be on the ballot. With your support, I believe we can spread the platform and encourage people to register and vote Green Party! See you at the Sequoia Park (I'll be by the gazebo) in Eureka, CA. Please! Thank you for your support, Henk Conn

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown?=
subject: Please help me flip Texas blue
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=526be0bfca&e=4712f71bea)
---
|
## Friends,
###
If this is the first time you're reading an email from me: Thank you. I know you get a lot of these from me and others.

My name is Kathleen Brown, and I'm a Democrat running in TX-13 against Republican and Trump acolyte Ronny Jackson.

I believe in American democracy, women's rights, and protecting our planet from the ravages of climate change. I'll do a good job representing you in Washington.

Now, I'm humbly asking you to chip in a few dollars for my campaign.

_**[Could you?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=3d295514aa&e=4712f71bea)**_

That's it. That's the whole message.

Thanks,
_Kathleen Brown._
_Democrat
Wichita Falls, TX_
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Friends, If this is the first time you're reading an email from me: Thank you. I know you get a lot of these from me and others. My name is Kathleen Brown, and I'm a Democrat running in TX-13 against Republican and Trump acolyte Ronny Jackson. I believe in American democracy, women's rights, and protecting our planet from the ravages of climate change. I'll do a good job representing you in Washington. Now, I'm humbly asking you to chip in a few dollars for my campaign. That's it. That's the whole message. Thanks, Kathleen Brown. name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: scattered, smothered and covered
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
You just have to see the tweet for yourself...
#

The Republicans in this race are finding every way possible to embarrass themselves, but Mark Walker took the crown recently with his Waffle House tweets.
In case you missed it, here’s the tweet that started it all:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220206-1-ma&t=1&refcode2=366_357359_PC6sBe&akid=366%2E357359%2EPC6sBe)
This led to a lot of questions. Such as: Who wears a suit to Waffle House? Is it possible to have a more lame hashbrown order? Where is his fork?
Even when he tried to defend himself, it appeared he lied and tweeted a different Waffle House meal from a different location... yes, it was weird.
But this is what we’ve come to expect from our opponents. They’re typical, out-of-touch politicians who lie and pretend to be voices for working people while they push the agenda of their corporate donors and extreme far-right interests.
Fortunately, we have the chance to send a champion for our families who will actually be a voice for the people to the Senate. A woman who will not waffle on the issues: Cheri Beasley.
That’s eggs-actly where you come in:
**[If you want to see Republicans’ chances scattered, smothered and covered on Election Day, then please be a Team Beasley All-Star and make a donation to flip this seat today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220206-1-ma&refcode2=366.357359.PC6sBe&t=2&akid=366%2E357359%2EPC6sBe)

PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

clean_body: we need the post office | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks – this is NOT the email we wanted to send. But Mitch McConnell is scheming to GUT the Post Office. | | | | | | | Thanks so much for your support! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: My parents' dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want you to know why I’m in this race. When my parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, they didn’t have much. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497444/329071242/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220206parents_YC_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjUxNzU4Zi03Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fwvgyi8ZZrGsnR9O6Qjdj_4IJ0v9A_iR8t-P5lcFGqI=)
---
Hello, Peter. In just a moment, [_**I’m going to ask you to support our campaign to fight for the families in Colorado’s new 8th District**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497445/329071243/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220206parents_YC_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjUxNzU4Zi03Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fwvgyi8ZZrGsnR9O6Qjdj_4IJ0v9A_iR8t-P5lcFGqI=). But before I do, I want you to know why I’m in this race. When my parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, they didn’t have much. But they had a dream: that with a lot of hard work and perseverance, and by staying true to their values of caring for others, they could give their children a future they’d never imagined for themselves. And guess what? That’s exactly what they did. They raised me and my three siblings to share their values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in — and all four of us were able to go to college and graduate in the span of a single generation. Now, their daughter is a doctor, state legislator, and running to be the first Latina Congressperson from Colorado (yes, they are very proud parents!). | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497446/329071244/-422067920?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220206parents_YC_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjUxNzU4Zi03Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fwvgyi8ZZrGsnR9O6Qjdj_4IJ0v9A_iR8t-P5lcFGqI=)
---
**So, as you can see, my parents’ dream is the American dream.** And I’m running for Congress because for too many families here in Colorado, that dream is out of reach.
Whether it’s the astronomical costs of prescription drugs, big corporations taking advantage of workers or raising prices, threats to every person’s right to choose, or politicians who just aren’t listening, Colorado’s families aren’t being given what they need to thrive.
**I’m running to change that, and to make loud the voices of Coloradans long ignored in Washington. But we’re up against powerful, corporate-backed opponents, and we need your help to win this.**
[_**Can you chip in whatever you’re able to help our campaign fight for Colorado families? Any amount goes a long way at this stage in the race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41497447/329071245/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220206parents_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjUxNzU4Zi03Zjg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fwvgyi8ZZrGsnR9O6Qjdj_4IJ0v9A_iR8t-P5lcFGqI=)

clean_body: I want you to know why I’m in this race. When my parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, they didn’t have much. | = Hello, Peter. In just a moment, =. But before I do, I want you to know why I’m in this race. When my parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, they didn’t have much. But they had a dream: that with a lot of hard work and perseverance, and by staying true to their values of caring for others, they could give their children a future they’d never imagined for themselves. And guess what? That’s exactly what they did. They raised me and my three siblings to share their values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in — and all four of us were able to go to college and graduate in the span of a single generation. Now, their daughter is a doctor, state legislator, and running to be the first Latina Congressperson from Colorado (yes, they are very proud parents!). | = So, as you can see, my parents’ dream is the American dream. And I’m running for Congress because for too many families here in Colorado, that dream is out of reach. Whether it’s the astronomical costs of prescription drugs, big corporations taking advantage of workers or raising prices, threats to every person’s right to choose, or politicians who just aren’t listening, Colorado’s families aren’t being given what they need to thrive. I’m running to change that, and to make loud the voices of Coloradans long ignored in Washington. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41501399/329096701/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk643-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MwZGU5My1hOTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2eN5mHdKmXTH04p-Xlmjq245BjAEBhI9iUN6fsqSDGQ=)
Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is.
**You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," working families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away.** That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve.
**Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working families. **
Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him.
This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $32 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. It'll take massive grassroots resources to compete with their funds.
**[We are still $9,237 away from what we need to raise tonight to stay on track for the month. So, Peter, that's why I have to ask: Please, can you make a $5 donation right now to defeat Sen. clean_body: | | | = Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is. You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," working families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away. That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve. Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working families. Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him. This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. The GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $32 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden's Trojan horse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3fxoa--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Fellow Conservative, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt33-4qqlpo2/ "CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES")**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches—trampling citizens' personal freedoms—Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

Fellow Conservative, America can never be allowed to become a woke, leftist utopia — **[which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt34-4qqlpo3/ "which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.")**
**[$250 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt35-4qqlpo4/ "$250 TO SAVE OUR STATES")

[$100 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt36-4qqlpo5/ "$100 TO SAVE OUR STATES")

[$75 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt37-4qqlpo6/ "$75 TO SAVE OUR STATES")

[$50 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt38-4qqlpo7/ "$50 TO SAVE OUR STATES")

[$25 TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt39-4qqlpo8/ "$25 TO SAVE OUR STATES")**

---
| |
* * *
**We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:** **61 of 99 state legislative chambers** **25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **28 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**
---

---

| Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
---
1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675
Washington, DC 20004

Text RSLCJOIN to 47682 to opt-in to State GOP's campaign alerts, updates and news.

Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible.

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxoa-1wt3a-4qqlpo8/)

Tucson Arizona 85750
United States

body:
I know I've reached out a lot lately, but this is important. & nbsp; &nb; sp;

I know I've reached out a lot lately, but this is important.

It’s Marco, I missed my FIRST goal of the year–this could set me back months. We can’t afford this in an election year.

I want to say that I hate begging you for help, but this is so important. The Senate majority is on the line, the fate of America hangs in the balance, **and my opponent just reported she raised over $7 million last quarter.** I’ll do whatever necessary to make sure that Conservatives take back the Senate this election.

**[FACT: My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump’s legacy. I’m humbly and earnestly asking, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxqs-1wthh-4qqlpo8/ "FACT: My race will determine control of the Senate, and the fate of Trump’s legacy. I’m humbly and earnestly asking, will you give $18 to retake the Senate?")**

My opponent outraised me ALL OF 2021. If we don’t do something and start this year off strong, Conservatives are going to be in grave danger to start off the new year.

**[I’m pleading for your help! I need 24 more Patriots to take a stand. Please, don’t let me down:](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxqs-1wthj-4qqlpo0/ "I’m pleading for your help! I need 24 more Patriots to take a stand. Please, don’t let me down:")**

Marco Rubio

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. name: Tom Emmer, NRCC Chairman
subject: I can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank you for standing with House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3fxsa--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello, Tom Emmer here.

I’m the Chairman of the National Republican Congressional Committee.

Let me start by saying **THANK YOU**. I wanted to share some great news. It is because of you that last month we not only reached our fundraising goal, but we crushed the Democrats.

Your support of House Republicans has brought us one step closer to winning back the Majority in 2022. **Every dollar you give forces Democrats to make a choice: RETIRE OR LOSE.**

I recently called some of our grassroots donors to personally thank them for contributing to the House Republicans' victory fund. **[If you want to hear from me next, chip in any amount you can here>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrk-4qqlpo5/ "If you want to hear from me next, chip in any amount you can here.>>>")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrl-4qqlpo6/ "Tom Emmer")
---

**I truly can’t say thank you enough for your support. **

Your donation is going to have a direct impact on the future of this country. It is because of your support, we are going to defeat the Corrupt Democrats and fire Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

**[Thank you for standing with me and House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022. Continue to take a stand by contributing any amount you can here>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrm-4qqlpo7/ "Thank you for standing with me and House Republicans in our fight to win back the House in 2022. Continue to take a stand by contributing any amount you can here>>>")**

God Bless.

Tom Emmer
Chairman of the NRCC
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrn-4qqlpo8/ "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtro-4qqlpo9/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrp-4qqlpo0/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxsa-1wtrq-4qqlpo1/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Todd Hershey
subject: I'm endorsing Doug Gansler for Governor
body:
Washington County residents will have a true friend and partner in Annapolis when Doug is elected. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzTU92COwRcUHogCjuVD8KWrYCzwSqe7afN2bXk14NNS7Zl-rRmU3dLErjmGBYzNoDwJUDsVtrpj9YP6EwvV-fTy468XeF4nD0yVXE66Qy51aJZCiT2-Oq-FrIuUSV9CtCAYgKCID0hXFAw4oxMPrrQWW5cpGcfy_MJ-k7xYZNtBwsA5yd-O9JrkfK1QN4qhCkxnF8jJlicUz1YZazJMLM4g/3jc/p1Bqyd3wS1S7elRlm9w0Cw/h0/XYMkBWHIBB7QCSgqpIQ3nlXYayTxj7doRmtu45dL9CA)

Hi friends, **I am excited to endorse my friend, Doug Gansler, for Governor of Maryland.**
---
Doug understands that in order to invest in those priorities that truly matter to all of us - from better schools and safe communities to quality health care and our environment - we must manage our taxpayer dollars wisely. We must avoid wasteful spending and unsustainable debt. And we must create a climate in which businesses can innovate, grow and sustain jobs. **Furthermore, Doug knows Washington County.** He has been here, time and time again, through the years. He understands the opportunities we have and the challenges we face. **I know that Washington County will have a true friend and partner in Annapolis when Doug is elected.** If you're ready to join me in endorsing Doug, **[add your name as a Gansler community endorser today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzTU92COwRcUHogCjuVD8KWpmYJdH08PXsEc-n3vM9sr-x0acdIQquEjGqBNMt2JxcP36fbYPAiIL0H_RMFkVm-u0cOZIBjz4-OmZ6v2F0QOD3H_5ExcHIfsui9EgdCNV75TqOxRduueCa47h6clVW6Go4VZ2dB9O1QyF4aXmOLj7CT5PgxaGCwrlGOAQ_liel1R7_VGz6jvVtGY3SmvjNtA/3jc/p1Bqyd3wS1S7elRlm9w0Cw/h1/uUmIpnxBOeGdEr94WK4NhXiqagu0BRRolmzCHvUCviA)**
---
[ **BECOME A COMMUNITY ENDORSER ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzTU92COwRcUHogCjuVD8KWob8SxiqMHRfuyWFQOzbXbURVdDIHllYTg0RUG5R7Vxb_-2ymwcucLhZtYERua3hQFtWVA1ME0rElAx0uuv1lw2EtLsQFVBdKfXWZiYNkYcACeYitBPfeLeqr8d4qXj9mgjEXkxksMjK-XHTEkJictcSDd8ccxsPDc49ILErRLbZG0gmPI1PDCZSZ0w-HJBvcA/3jc/p1Bqyd3wS1S7elRlm9w0Cw/h2/OwE1iI2v08gkA_JpSz2wyjlOGMq1HFmCf_ZvVhEHQVE)
---
Thank you, Todd Hershey _Treasurer since 1987_ _Washington County_

[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzugEmN6AWe2OvtNOjjhBC2Vi0F85ldRZFlfhUdT84Kpdf6uWQYvWUhCqTu5Cot82HwtrRPjaIZQ7dePdRUxRacNJNWZWCmVBlakxbCMeDMeFdpo-tEZwJUfxY6a53kqW8_Fg73DN94StzXcwPk4Mjg4zcosSnowBkrBkT4TH_8M5pwaaDSGqGKrviY_yzrX1DvLe2Gpe8sh6tixQcZHd1-12sgS09mXGn9GPTYLqpVP7dOtqhYmzkXL7kkJrst9QNJNj-olerZPtE9FJw8gNdmHw0KgauiFOsJHOW18TE2A7UA2f9jiF8SvaliRhBK9K-Qw/3jc/p1Bqyd3wS1S7elRlm9w0Cw/h3/RDUrBa5G_gVzsJ7E5uGu6ErCUPOxq3zfK3_LeqF84Zs)

Earlier this week was the 152nd anniversary of the ratification of the 15th Amendment, which guaranteed the right to vote. It wasn’t until the Voting Rights Act of 1965 that legal barriers that denied Black Americans the right to vote were removed.

Fast forward to today: Republican state lawmakers are introducing hundreds of bills to suppress voters and pass dozens of laws that limit access to the ballot box. **Legislation that protects voting rights is more important than ever.**
Yet, Mike Garcia voted against the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act, which would expand Californians’ opportunities to vote and combat these voter suppression tactics. **We know that this is an important issue, so Quaye wants to hear from you.**
Can you spare a moment of your time and let us know: **Do you agree we should be doing more to expand voting opportunities and combat voter suppression tactics?**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Hey, do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Most political experts believe Wisconsin is the best chance Democrats have to flip a Senate seat, which explains why Republicans plan to blanket our state with television ads. Hey folks, do you have a minute?

Most political experts believe Wisconsin is the best chance Democrats have to flip a Senate seat, which explains why Republicans plan to blanket our state with television ads. Heck, Ron Johnson already has two of his own misleading ads on the airwaves.

I’m reaching out because we have to win this election to grow our 50-50 Democratic Senate majority and get this seat back to work for the people of Wisconsin, but that cannot happen unless we have the resources to respond to the well-funded efforts to save Ron Johnson’s skin.

I appreciate you opening this message on a Sunday, and I hope you’ll consider making a donation right now to help us fight back and flip this seat from red to blue. Thank you in advance.

**[Please contribute any amount to our U.S. Senate campaign in Wisconsin. February is the shortest month of the year, which means we’ll be working extra hard to hit our weekly fundraising goals from here on out. Look, this guy has been more than happy to do the bidding of corporate interests and the wealthy few in Washington and accept their help to win re-election. But I believe we need leaders who work for the people, not themselves. That's why I’m counting on you today.

Thanks for anything you can pitch in. Your support means more than you know.

Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Public Trough](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqzMN-L8sh52BcsWS5a5Q0qrb0xuex8B-fGXBmC39fBjQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_4&n=1) I just got [this letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFk_8FAhTx0IRH_LwLmJBzvhl5bBRFiwy9J3tbb4ipwmA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_4&n=2) in the mail from the Assembly Rules Committee. It reads: _Dear Assemblymember Kiley:_ _You received the following per diem amounts during the 2021 calendar year from the California State Assembly:_ **_2021 Total: $0.00_** I’ve received that letter each year in the Legislature, saving taxpayers over $200,000 in per diem declined. The Majority, however, is always coming up with new tricks for getting themselves even more per diem. Too many elected officials simply feed at the public trough. It's spawned a professional political class that doesn’t serve the people. That's why I support term limits for Congress: to revive representation as our Founders intended it. And it’s why I rely on citizens-supporters for the funds needed to run a winning campaign. Today at 3:32 PM is exactly one month since I announced for Congress. At this moment we have the support of 4,811 citizen donors. With your help we can get to 5,000. [Donate Securely: Kiley for Congress 2022](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_4&n=3) Sincerely,
Kevin p.s. Declining per diem means giving up $211 in personal income each day.
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Helping and listening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020622whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020622whem]Good evening Peter,
One month into 2022, and Wade has been busy traveling across the district visiting new places and meeting new people. Here are some recent highlights – yard signs, oysters, and more!
We kicked off this week on Monday with a yard sign distribution event and meet & greet at the Glynn Dems headquarters in Brunswick! We have officially received our SECOND order of yard signs, and they are available at our campaign office in Savannah if you still need one!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Glynn%20Coedit.jpg]Last Friday, Wade volunteered for Migrant Equity Southeast – packing book bags for children in the area and assisting with organizing MESE’s office as they started a new system for food donations.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/MESEedit.jpg]It’s oyster season, y’all! On Saturday, Wade travelled to the UGA Marine Education Center and Aquarium for their “Oyster Roast for a Reason” to support Georgia’s first oyster hatchery.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/UGA%20ORedit.jpg]The next day, Wade was at “Oysters on the Bluff” to support Chatham-Savannah Citizen Advocacy – a local nonprofit that recruits voluntary citizen advocates on behalf of people with disabilities.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/CSCA%20ORedit.jpg]Finally, Wade rounded out this week by attending the South of Derenne Association (SODA) Luncheon at Barnes Restaurant.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/SODA%20Lunchedit.jpg]We are building a coalition of supporters across Georgia and we’re excited to keep spreading the word that Wade is the right candidate for the First District. If you want Wade to visit an event near you, let us know!
Thank you for your continued support,
The Wade Brigade
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringmomentum?refcode=020622whemb]https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0e0450c4-a087-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/a6d104e8-ae87-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmQxMDRlOC1hZTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IxHb6vujGyeW2gXnnj0fEgNDxZNsprIKC4bEwOdrGgE=&id=127098231 .
Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
Wade Herring for Congress
PO Box 9145
Savannah, GA 31412
United States

**We urgently need your help.**
We have an opportunity this November to defeat Chuck Grassley and guarantee Democrats hold onto our Senate majority for another two years. **Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley in Iowa, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows only 27% of voters want to reelect Grassley!**
There’s never been a better chance to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, but Chuck Grassley has over $3.7 million in his campaign war chest thanks to his Wall Street donors, Big Pharma, and the NRA.
**Mike is facing his first big deadline of the month, but right now we’re still short of our $120,000 goal and what we need to win. If Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic majority, he is counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
Let's fight the gun grabbers

| | | | | | | [ ](randpaul.com)
---
| [ ](randpaul.com)
---
| Dear, Patriot A new attack on gun rights has just been launched. **Joe Biden wants every gun owner to have to register their firearm with the federal government. And he just announced a new step towards that goal.** Biden announced new plans to crack down on "ghost guns" ahead of a visit to New York City. These are homemade guns that don't have a commercial serial number. Some of them are 3D printed. Why would the Biden administration be so concerned about guns that the government can't track? Well, there's a simple answer for that: the Biden administration wants a National Gun Registry. **They want every gun in America compiled on a list. They want to know exactly how many and what type of firearms you own.** In fact, just a few days ago, the ATF responded to a congressional inquiry by admitting that they have records on over 900 million firearms transfers. The groundwork is being laid for a scheme to force law-abiding gun owners to be tracked by the federal government. **The Second Amendment truly is in danger.** That's why it's so important to keep the Democrat Party from gaining ground in Congress in this year's elections. The support in the Democrat caucus for radical gun-grabbing schemes is overwhelming. It is one of the core planks of their progressive platform. Fortunately, right now their margins in Congress are extremely slim. **But if they manage to increase their majorities, and in particular break the 50-50 tie in the Senate, America is going to experience a wave of gun control like it has never seen before.** For that reason, I am asking you to do what you can to help me hold off the Democrats in my upcoming Senate race. My opponent is a diehard supporter of gun control, and he will be a rubber stamp for whatever gun grabs the Biden Administration tries to implement. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that Biden can't put a gun grabber in my Senate seat?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/aw04TFc8uHoie8XMXaSZBQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRj4q6pP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYfmpKQBiyCAXtFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) The Bill of Rights is under serious threat by this administration. The First Amendment is being attacked by an FBI that seeks to criminalize the speech of parents. The Fourth Amendment is under assault by the Biden Administration's "Domestic War on Terror." But Democrats hold a special hatred in their hearts for the Second Amendment. And they are doing everything they can to disarm law-abiding gun owners. If the Democrats manage to increase their majorities in Congress this November, as they are actively trying to do, the most radical gun control bills will be able to pass with ease. The Second Amendment will be shattered. My Democrat opponent supports the full Biden gun control agenda. If elected, he would be a rubber stamp for any and all gun grabs. [Will you help me hold off the gun control lobby by making a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/aw04TFc8uHoie8XMXaSZBQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRj4q6pP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYfmpKQBiyCAXtFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul ****

I’m so, SO excited to sign up! However, when I was combing through our records this morning there were no recent updates _at all_ in your file. Do you plan on signing up for President Trump’s new app? I’m finalizing our records tomorrow morning -- could you please respond before then so I can update your file?
**Choose One Of The Following Options:** **[I Stand With Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxtt-1wu58-4qqlpo4/)** **[I Don’t Support Trump >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxtt-1wu59-4qqlpo5/)**

_“We want to be the most family-friendly site” and it will be “open for all ideas, all political debate from the left to the right."_
[**If you trust Devin Nunes and President Trump to deliver an unbelievable free-speech experience for your friends and family, please let me know immediately if you would sign up.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxtt-1wu5a-4qqlpo5/)

subject: Marshmallow mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Nothing says “mom running for office” like calmly doing call time while simultaneously pulling _melted marshmallow_ out of your son’s hair, because their sister thought they should have a _s’mores hat._
As the saying goes, “If you want something done, give it to a busy mom.”
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC_1d7MW0aGgnHh54oSqS1e8G9SHcf9Ue8ufMoxbHZB3WDJK30nyIXWGQh_ZHZj7b4E9TSX82t7i4ZMKfZY1Lmak1CHS0MG0_kD_mJ3iFhKv9HStH6OkSVwfkAjVT7taUdjQ4CTqwsi81tuhSp_HfhSJcRtMW21UQoC1l_qMUF-vbVn_XCBnfXPPb0OkuS72K9o5huLTmAa22yDzbUruiugXrhsu9yurjfAEUEf6KV6uBlimLl0VDeXlRYlRDWvUJ8BSl9_3lvUgkX8II0hSAZ4scA6gWDDd6SudtQ9U41X-ftkyPhoBX2pioCRV40p2JGg/3jc/UMtJ2cA7R-ON6k1jQph1Nw/h0/0t7Ocy-PzqK7tufYpawyZDBedLoKRpE5vUatusXjAJc)_My kids hurling snowballs (fun!) instead of marshmallow (sticky!)_
**I’m running for the House because there aren’t enough moms in Congress to represent the perspectives of working families. If there were more moms in office, we’d have the policies we need to thrive.**
An extension of the Child Tax Credit was a big help — lifting millions of children out of poverty, until an overwhelmingly mom-lacking Congress let it expire. While parents struggle, corporate lobbyists pay members of Congress to block universal childcare, pre-K, and paid family leave.
Congress can find billions for defense contractors, tax cuts for the rich, and subsidies for fossil fuel companies. But when it comes to funding policies that would help families, all we hear is _“How will we pay for it?”_
Our families will never be a priority until we have more moms at the table shaping the policies that affect our lives.
**Out of 535 Members of Congress, only a few dozen are moms of young kids. And in my campaign to be the _first_ woman and mom elected to New York’s 3rd District, I’m proud to be endorsed by Moms in Office and thousands of grassroots donors like you.**
****[**If we want a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of our families first, then we need to elect more moms. Can you chip in $10 or more to my campaign today?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC_1d7MW0aGgnHh54oSqS1e82DanwAFW8Ug_lPDJdh1pPY4H4O3ml6gnT19a02wF221_Bihzl5LinYul8wNQCkF66RKqi574MoLoNkQ5ivJ46AhLH8FIUrgze7F4QX1Xk_J12K7bdOzkyatfnqsVRSXa_CIqK-bskvwLbttr4c1aciLUFwndXbf-YkX5DVyKzHUVKCC96vxUmoMlVkWEIm7_uZLtN19LU7H0GwG4PMfdNmZB4tDfbD5-ZUMG0VfxXDf0qV4BBt8n27qy75HtfXDRZk2oBv0sYGQec90CENJeS3F4nzxbHvvPqSkp0o6h1JY/3jc/UMtJ2cA7R-ON6k1jQph1Nw/h1/aSXeG2jap5EmoJ-UJW9dONdzYl0N7cKs-393Oun-AG4)
I’m running for Congress on the Mom Agenda.
For our children, I’ll fight to end gun violence, boost education, and provide universal child care and family leave that every other industrialized nation enjoys.
For our families, I’ll fight for Medicare for All, a fair tax system and stronger rights and pay for workers.
And for moms like me, I’ll fight for equal pay, reproductive justice and an end to workplace discrimination.
[**We need representation that thinks beyond their next election. We need moms in Congress who will deliver our children and grandchildren a better world. Chip in $10 or more to elect more moms like me.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC_1d7MW0aGgnHh54oSqS1e89EIJptn-b-KLkL5bo5-eqmKDwS_avWNnua-mi5nVBBn88Oy-p-YLBHGbpDiw2qSVUmidZ1_0cklbGu_o-w6maC9SaRLRHEBJFo5JuPbrijoPtSqLhyudaNweP99K8SnqfUYOj9YtGjgn6Tx58X8XpzC0BQ8QqYXwV7v3xT1EnkxndGlEj7Dz1JM4XbVmx5cyzHvhnXhhRx1nXbDyt89N_qEHOq-I0P6mhNpboXztbVZ11mi8p4W-9VJzz4HDafBhm224XLlyU8aD91OvvgE3TBCZE121IEzx8nl7c0K2TPk/3jc/UMtJ2cA7R-ON6k1jQph1Nw/h2/mDI-_p_t8Ay4pP0nA_4WBqGwGafhAeeR6QE_rHRnMSc)
Thanks for standing up.
– Melanie

name: URGENT TRUMP POLL (via DCCC)
subject: Trump’s return BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
ADD YOUR NAME TO LET US KNOW YOU OPPOSE A SECOND TRUMP TERM >>
| | | **BREAKING: Trump says he would 'absolutely' consider pardons for Jan. 6 rioters**
| | | | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| | We're disgusted.

At his latest rally, Trump promised to consider**pardons for January 6** rioters if he is re-elected president in 2024.

We need to respond NOW.
******[LET US KNOW: DO YOU OPPOSE A SECOND TRUMP TERM? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs33Z-)**
---

It's infuriating - but it isn't surprising.

Donald Trump held another disgusting rally last weekend, _**where he proposed pardoning January 6 rioters.**_

Trump has made it clear that he values ABSOLUTE power and his own ego over the integrity of our democracy and the rule of law.

And worst of all, he's already hinted he intends to run for President again if his Republicans DESTROY our Democratic Majorities:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

It's never been more clear that Donald Trump is a danger to our democracy.

**But now he 's SURGING in the polls - and he could be on the verge of yet another presidential run if we don't act soon.**

That's why we're calling on 45,000 grassroots Democrats to add their name to Dem HQ's survey and let us know they OPPOSE a second Trump term.
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Add your name and let us know you OPPOSE a second Trump term. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46358446&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDY3NTM4MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure our Democratic Majority is protected -- and to end Donald Trump's relentless attacks on President Obama's legacy. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Trump's Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46358446&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDY3NTM4MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

subject: NOT asking for money

body:
Hi! It’s Yvette with the House Republicans’ Policy Team. We aren’t asking for money, we’re asking for your input on our platform ahead of the 2022 election cycle.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3fxua--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hey, it’s Yvette with the House Republicans’ Policy Team! I opened my spreadsheet this morning to check if you completed your 2022 Platform Audit yet, and my heart sank when I saw **[you failed to submit it.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fxua-1wu99-4qqlpo1/ "you failed to submit it. ")**

_**This is embarrassing.**_

Time and time again, we’ve asked you to complete our GOP Platform Audit, and time and time again, _**you have REFUSED**_.

DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403UsEtm7gHVCz2FvS6NYfdyR3FPEMaPlq73dTrH7-1e4bly9FklWyPzlAWjtpK7JPRXu1ahzmSXnQJBb9Gy0Ny8PxKpDpX5Tymdgnkskz_lOVteerbfvOieFkRPdRaxb8Y2V8TcJuzqHVvxqgpiw2O8G2Gy9znqGTmqOhQLMp_D46OYXnwEjveCv1c6WAZPCE-LF4_nPeh60iK63RnNYMrovrdhLw50HDXURdn02lN9309eqTZDTfL9QgGuq8v-s5ihfzZHMmaRpLZyN2CBmNfqSjLn9kPhvPIArWPI0uQKC61yNfUGBC62CsPPNgtFeg-FFxH-aUOdmIYyiyKuVVTsS-xXAIrGOFuwi9T4vfn95imZs-HH3mtdZ9M8BJNECj_g/3jc/ZCx9JwFTSiqxS53jJU0ogA/h3/qq_icpzkPz_JQ0NGQCa5FM8-QzrzdZnxff3qMzT54Uk)

We can’t sit back and watch this happen. | | **💵 Did you know? 💵 ** **Social Security trust funds will be exhausted by 2034 unless Congress acts now.** The vast majority of Americans SUPPORT Social Security, but Republican lawmakers would rather cut benefits than see Americans receive the support they deserve. **TEAM WEST LIVE POLL:** **Do you support strengthening Social Security?** Response needed by 11:59 PM tonight | **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41502047/329120270/-994121507?amount=25&refcode=ea.ef3b6aa4-b987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjNiNmFhNC1iOTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reBAHocMnv3eCP5qnBlqAFIYG5gJUmDUfeb2OWr8X1M=)** | **[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41502048/329120271/-994121507?amount=25&refcode=ea.ef3b6aa4-b987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjNiNmFhNC1iOTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reBAHocMnv3eCP5qnBlqAFIYG5gJUmDUfeb2OWr8X1M=)**

Team,
**Tens of thousands of Oregonians (and millions of Americans across the nation) rely on Social Security benefits.** But this critical social program is under threat—for our seniors today and generations to come.
Seniors have earned their benefits by paying into them for their entire working lives, and we cannot let Republicans gain control of Congress only to strip these benefits down to the bones.
Matt West is running for Congress to ensure that every American has access to the social safety net they deserve.
That means not only funding but strengthening Social Security indefinitely.
With your support, we will elect a progressive fighter who prioritizes financial independence for our seniors. But we need to know if you agree:
So before midnight, answer the following: **do you support strengthening Social Security?**
**[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41502050/329120272/-994121507?amount=25&refcode=ea.ef3b6aa4-b987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjNiNmFhNC1iOTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reBAHocMnv3eCP5qnBlqAFIYG5gJUmDUfeb2OWr8X1M=)** | **[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41502051/329120273/-994121507?amount=25&refcode=ea.ef3b6aa4-b987-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjNiNmFhNC1iOTg3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=reBAHocMnv3eCP5qnBlqAFIYG5gJUmDUfeb2OWr8X1M=)**

name: Survey Team at Voter Protection Project
subject: You are invited to join the Voting Rights Advisory Board >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
you’ve been hand-selected, :
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)
---
We’re reaching out to you as one of our **2,500 most active supporters** to hear YOUR thoughts on which races we should prioritize, which candidates to support, and what issues folks like YOU care most about. **As a committed Democrat, you’ve been hand-selected for our Voting Rights Senior Advisory Board – we need your input ASAP![PLEASE, take our 90-second survey to SAVE Voting Rights →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey/?source=VPP_20220206_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)** | [PLEASE, TAKE 90-SECONDS AND JOIN OUR VOTING RIGHTS SENIOR ADVISORY BOARD →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey/?source=VPP_20220206_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)
---
This is perhaps the most consequential year in the history of our democracy – **_we can’t afford to let the GOP erase our voting rights._**
So we’re inviting our most trusted supporters (including YOU!) to join our **Voting Rights Senior Advisory Board** to help us form a winning midterm strategy.
**And we don’t take your survey responses lightly:**
✅ In 2019, you told us to support Joe Biden in the Democratic primaries!
✅ In 2020, you told us to send more resources to Georgia!
✅ In 2021, you told us to rush cash to vulnerable Democrats to hold our fragile House and Senate majorities!

_So we need to know, team, how should Democrats approach these critical midterm elections?_
**[CLICK HERE TO COMPLETE YOUR STRATEGY SURVEY NOW →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey/?source=VPP_20220206_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)**
[JOIN OUR VOTING RIGHTS SENIOR ADVISORY BOARD →](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Voting_Rights_Senior_Advisory_Board_Survey/?source=VPP_20220206_EMSURV_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)
---
Thank you for your continued support

— VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=6&akid=1227%2E878179%2E6vMBfv)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Gov. DeSantis on my investigation . . .
body:
I'm proud to say that just days after my video when viral, Governor DeSantis and Florida's Attorney General announced that they will be taking legal action against the Biden Administration for releasing illegal immigrants into Florida.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/pY0oQzmYvXig5gtiyAVNew/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wT7mwbz4QsSRuycxyas3HQ/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q) After I released my video showing hundreds of Mexican migrants being bussed into an Extended Stay America hotel in Maitland, Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis was quick to respond!

I'm proud to say that just days after my video when viral, Governor DeSantis and Florida's Attorney General announced that they will be taking legal action against the Biden Administration for releasing illegal immigrants into Florida.

My video prompted thousands of people to contact Governor DeSantis' office about illegal immigration and action was immediately taken.

This was Gov. Ron DeSantis' response when he was asked during one of his press conferences about my video by a political reporter:

_" If you're knowingly involved in that, you're doing stuff we don't want. We don't want the problems at the southern border to be imported into the state of Florida. And so people that are instrumental in that, we want to hold accountable by, of course, denying business opportunities with state and local but, maybe even more important, making them pay restitution for all the costs that's going to end up doing."_

And he's not wrong . . .

According to research conducted by the Federation of Immigration Reform (FAIR), illegal immigration costs America $116 BILLION each year!

**But that 's not even the biggest toll that immigration is having on America.**

Each year, violent illegal aliens and migrants on overstayed visas kill THOUSANDS of Americans.

But, the U.S. Government refuses to keep statistics on the number of Americans killed by illegal aliens, so it's likely more than "just" a few thousand Americans killed each year.

While Democrats run to the podium with each mass shooting (even if it's terrorism) and demand an immediate gun ban, you never see them say a word when an illegal alien kills a child, mother, son, or daughter.

They never said a word when three months ago, a beautiful five-year-old girl, just outside of my district, was killed by an illegal alien from Guatemala who was driving drunk.

They'll never say a word about 19-year-old Adrienne Sophia Exum who was killed by a drunk illegal alien. Even worse, the Biden Regime refuses to deport her alien killer!

They'll never say anything about Iowa college student Mollie Tibbetts who was murdered by an illegal alien.

And they'll never take a stand for 18-year-old Joshua Wilkerson who was beaten to death with a wooden rod by Hermilo Moralez, an illegal from Belize.

It's sick, and it MUST end. And, this is why [when I get to Congress](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wT7mwbz4QsSRuycxyas3HQ/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q) I will immediately draft legislation and encourage my colleagues to support a 10-year minimum immigration moratorium.

[With your continued support, and a donation today,](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wT7mwbz4QsSRuycxyas3HQ/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q) I will win my race and get to Congress where I will be telling the stories of the thousands of Americans who have been permanently separated from their families, due to being killed by illegal aliens.

When I get into Congress, I will be telling these stories to the world. I will make sure that every American killed by an illegal alien will have their story echoed for change . . . [please help me get there today](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/wT7mwbz4QsSRuycxyas3HQ/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/1IXvplQceCHFeLaF4W763u763Q)

Friend -- We are saddened to inform you of the passing of Shirley Ceci, beloved wife to retired Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice Lou Ceci, mother, grandmother, great-grandmother, sister, and aunt. Services will be held on Friday, February 11 at Schmidt and Bartelt Funeral Home located at 10121 W North Ave in Wauwatosa. Read her obituary in the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2NSdOwLJme3cwfpDnjtHyXuI_5UlL6nE_RRDo5DEursB&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shirley_ceci_rip&n=2) :
> _Shirley H. Ceci_ _Wauwatosa - (Nee Haldi) Entered into Eternal Life on February 4, 2022 at Elaine's Hope, in the Lutheran Home in Wauwatosa._ _Shirley was born in Des Plaines, IL, on November 6, 1936, the youngest of three children born to Arnold and Rose Haldi. After graduating from Jefferson High School, she moved to Milwaukee, where she met her future husband Louis, while employed as a legal secretary._ _She is survived by her husband, life partner and best friend of over 65 years, Justice Louis J. Ceci, and their children Joseph (Pamela) of Wauwatosa, Geraldine (Peter) Cupery of Madison, David (Marilyn) of East Hampton, NY, Remy of Pepin and Louis G. of Nevada City, CA. She is further survived by her grandchildren Douglas, Theodor, Thomas, Nicholas, Anthony, Joseph (Lynn) Gleue and Rose (Morgan) Rogers, as well as her brother Donald (Nancy) of Denver, dear nieces, nephews, great-grandchildren and many loving friends._ _Shirley was preceeded in death by her parents, her sister Grace, and daughter Kristin._ _She was instrumental in advancing Justice Louis J. Ceci's career through her fiercely loyal love, encouragement and support. They loved to travel, enjoying immensely their ocean cruises, and exploring their heritages in Italy, Switzerland, and Germany. They also enjoyed building their homes in the Town of Jackson, Glendale, Fitchburg, the Town of Brookfield, and St. Petersburg, FL._ _Visitation for family and friends will be held on Friday, February 11, at Schmidt & Bartelt Funeral Home, 10121 North Avenue in Wauwatosa, from 10 a.m. until the funeral service at 12 p.m. Private entombment will take place at Resurrection Cemetery in Mequon._ _Shirley, her wonderful laugh and radiant smile will live in our hearts forever._ _In lieu of flowers, the family requests that donations be made in Shirley's name to the Alzheimer's Foundation of America._
We ask that you join us in prayer for Justice Ceci and his family during this difficult time. \- Team WisGOP

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What Democrats could be giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we fail to deliver transformative change for the people of this country...
#
Peter,
While corporate lobbyists and the GOP try to defeat President Biden’s agenda, we must continue to fight back.
**As long as Democrats in the Senate _do not_ pass Build Back Better and _do not_ end the filibuster, we are ceding power to Republicans.**
This is an election year, Peter. And if we fail to deliver transformative change for the people of this country — by strengthening voting rights, investing in the care economy, and fighting climate change — we risk giving Republicans an advantage at the polls.
**We absolutely cannot allow the GOP to regain power in Congress.** That’s why delivering for the people with Build Back Better and voting rights legislation is critical.
[**Chip in $3 or anything at all to help Pramila fight to deliver for the people AND protect our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate in 2022.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9922?refcode=em20220206-1012&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1012%2E420207%2EN7rLML)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9922?refcode=em20220206-1012&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1012%2E420207%2EN7rLML)**
We don’t have the luxury to give up, Peter. The GOP has introduced more than 400 voter suppression laws across the country. The right to vote has been restricted for so many, and obstacles have been placed in front of voters, especially in communities of color.
While Democrats managed to pass the Child Tax Credit last year and deliver for struggling families, that tax credit expired last month. We cannot fail to deliver on the promise of President Biden’s agenda. We MUST deliver for the voters who put us in this position, and for all the working people, families, and communities in America.
[**Can you contribute $3 today to help Pramila lead the fight on voting rights, Build Back Better, and delivering for the people? We can do this, but we’re running out of time.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9922?refcode=em20220206-1012&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1012%2E420207%2EN7rLML)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220206-1012-footer&t=22&refcode2=1012_420207_N7rLML&akid=1012%2E420207%2EN7rLML)**

Could you imagine, Harriet and President Trump both on stage in front of thousands of supporters, who are ready to restore Wyoming’s conservative values to our country?

clean_body: | | | | That would be so exciting! Do you agree? | Peter, President Trump has been holding rallies across the country and they are always packed. Just this past week, President Trump held a rally in Texas for thousands of people who support the America First agenda. And with Harriet Hageman being endorsed by President Trump, a rally featuring both of them right here in Wyoming would be TREMENDOUS! Could you imagine, Harriet and President Trump both on stage in front of thousands of supporters, who are ready to restore Wyoming’s conservative values to our country? We need 300 donations to our Wyoming Rally Fund before MIDNIGHT. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

body:
We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. | ****
---
**URGENT:
_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_**

A recent release from Gallup polling is being used to back liberal media claims that Republicans are _"leaving the party in droves"_ \-- and if it's true, it means the worst has happened...and that support for Joe Biden is growing.

Is it true? [**Respond now ➞**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7af7b98fdc0e4ec8aae4676d227400e3&_e=ZB2IK_ET2XIJNARsk546Wad_qRNX2bH2Wq-gpI_rjzcq86wNtHOeDYOWU4AEUanuz9gutG_CQ-FAsSCfaCjMxFS8ZANOVEJCqLRPugpGPictYrbRXBvFrBb_lWdwvC4PisgC_itl1J-2opxA4nlyDN1Ed50q9BBK_CDd7EMPb7YT26Uog0VzEEPM1CKbNRothp39-gc6bzdg2e5436AC2Jn0edfDrjhQeDfiotSRwXnuEaLbRXN4iynM82oAT0-M5qyA_P0lWCesCSQDPNKM5UEF0K-azCsvHSb1bJ_KKDeCvC8nT19dwrwwxWUnok_1m2GxFY7d8VWmUq8ZwETwcNl4kTUxuuuMe7XnTaxRf8VY-MPZees1I3TO5MLng-3aRsA4MkQlFoJQxauRy0QuO0SqHwWGMF2-5Jt2DjrmlTBGuVavu0snQF2VvMMJp7y4a07_028UyEu5kd3rRFO3S1OncWSroy5C0fctKcC-2s8%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Ban ERIC from Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Remove dead voters before they vote Democrat! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=47ff3437b6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with a critical update in the fight for Election Integrity in Arizona.

**I am officially calling for banning ERIC in Arizona.**

Don’t know what ERIC is, let me tell you:

ERIC stands for the Electronic Registration Information Center. It is a thinly veiled strategy by Democrats to make sure that voter roll clean up is done in THEIR way – which is to say not at all.

_The Gateway Pundit_ describes ERIC as:

_On Thursday The Gateway Pundit revealed Democrats and leftists have fought ferociously to prevent the cleanup of State voter registration rolls. Recognizing a potential niche, left-wing activists created ERIC to clean voter rolls their way, using their rules. So in 2012 the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) was formed as a membership organization primarily for blue States. ERIC is essentially a left wing voter registration drive disguised as voter roll clean up. But it’s been gaining traction in Red States too. Originally funded by the Soros Open Society, it is now responsible for cleaning the voter rolls in 31 States, plus D.C. A top election official from each member State is appointed a seat on the ERIC Board or as an Officer, all unpaid positions._

If you are not surprised that Soros money would be behind such a thing – neither am I.
To see the blatant fraudulent partisanship behind such a system, just look at the data.

**In the past four years, this system has had exactly ZERO ineligible voters from the biggest counties’ rolls, and minimal from others:**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8f0b5bfef7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **What does this have to do with Arizona?**

I’m glad you asked.

Arizona is a member state of ERIC. This means that the countless and innumerable voter fraud that occurred in Arizona as verified by the Maricopa Audit could have been laundered through this Soros-funded Leftist voter scam.

**Simply put, it is the job of Secretaries of State to ensure that Elections are protected and that voters have 100% confidence in the integrity of the Election.**

**_As long as ERIC is in use in Arizona, there is no chance that we will have secure elections._**

I am calling for the immediate cessation of use of ERIC as a crucial step in making Arizona the GOLD STANDARD for Election Integrity.

**And this is why I need your help. We are making huge strides for Election Integrity in Arizona – but we are fighting against Soros money and Leftist manipulators and liars.**

**_If you want a fair game, you are looking in the wrong place._**

[And the only way for us to push back is with money. Lots of it.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=edb611b02e&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Please donate whatever you can today to ensure that ERIC gets out of Arizona, that Elections are Secure, and to make sure that we have an America First Patriot safeguarding elections in Arizona!_

Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ddf1d4e4fd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fc152f8a58&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. Please follow me on Telegram. [https://t.me/MarkFinchemAZ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6dd65da72f&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8bc9f2de43) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8bc9f2de43).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Feb. 6, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/07e00d4b0ede/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8844021?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“One man with courage makes a majority.”_ _― Andrew Jackson_
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Lunch with Gwen James at The Midtowner in Hattiesburg
I had the pleasure of having lunch with one of the Hattiesburg area's finest, Gwen James! One of the best things about this campaign is getting to develop relationships with people like Gwen. She’s a trailblazer in the real estate profession, not to mention a community leader. I look forward to more lunches with Gwen, and I appreciate her support of our campaign.|
---
| | | | | |
### Interview with Paul Gallo on Super Talk
I appreciate Paul Gallo for having me on Super Talk earlier this week to discuss current legislative topics, including law enforcement, tax cuts, our nation's leadership, the Senate Equal Pay bill, online sports betting and more. I also gave some insight into why I am running to be your Congressman. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=68d0daf4a5&e=698f056321) to listen to the full radio show. My 24-minute segment starts at 2:07:50. Here I’m pictured with my friend House Rep. John Read from Gautier who did the earlier segment of the show.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### U.S. National Debt Exceeds $30 Trillion
According to the newest report from the Treasury Department, the U.S. national debt has exceeded $30 trillion for the first time in our nation's history. Our representatives in D.C. need to be held accountable for their reckless spending.If elected as your Congressman, I will bring the fight to D.C. and work to balance the nation's budget. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=20e599381f&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on cutting taxes and balancing the budget.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f89f9d110d&e=698f056321) to read the full article from The Wall Street Journal for more information on our nation’s debt.|
---
| | | | | |
### First Responders Caucus Hold Kick-off Press Conference, Recognize Six (6) Pieces of Legislation Moving Forward
I am grateful to be serving as the Senate Chairman of the newly formed Mississippi First Responders Caucus alongside Bubba Carpenter, serving as President, and Jeff Hale, serving as House Chair. Thursday we held the official kick-off. We started this caucus to raise the voice of first responders on the issues that matter most to them and in the process, institute policy that will benefit them for a lifetime. It’s time that they had a bigger say at our capitol. We acknowledged six pieces of legislation directly that are moving forward in the legislative process.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e560b36212&e=698f056321) to read the WLBT article that I was quoted in about the First Responders Caucus.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Visiting with Wiggins Fire Department
I enjoyed meeting with members of the Wiggins Fire Department today along with Chief Hatten. We talked about how we can help them and all first responders. I appreciate their service and dedication!|
---
| | | | | |
###

**Welcome To The Team Cam!**
We welcomed Cam Kinney to the team this week. Cam graduated from University of Southern Mississippi and is married to Caroline Bradley Kennedy from Agricola. Both Cam and Caroline served in the student government at the University of Southern Mississippi.|
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Bills Will Be Up for Senate Floor Debate. You can follow the proceedings on the [**MS Legislature’s Youtube Channel**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f66b5267ff&e=698f056321).

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=47769a8f0e&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Keep Up With Us!
