**_In order for us to reclaim power from Nancy Pelosi, we HAVE to Take Back the House. We are only 6 SEATS AWAY!_**

Democrats in power this past year have been a complete and utter disaster. Inflation is crippling families. Challenges from the COVID pandemic are still unsolved, 2 years later. Our small businesses have suffered immeasurably, and there is a dire need for change.

When I ran for Congress in 2020, I faced constant attacks from Nancy Pelosi and her band of cronies... As I embark on my mission to serve YOU in Iowa’s 1st District, I am humbly asking for your support.

Iowans NEED a representative who will prioritize their needs, keep their families safe, maintain prosperity and freedom, and keep their jobs intact. I am the candidate who has and will work day and night to achieve just that.

[**Will you join me in pushing Iowa AND America towards greatness and away from harmful Liberal policies?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=02f16bccfd054a668f733b143c97013d&_e=DNiwxVN9hN_u4EAcGcLl4FouTvV7PQl9tzdukcvaGUoZ-C8J3ckuhWxah1Sl4BhV0vV5NS8zGN3bMPxLQzRFwnqmfGeS6w0vQN57ccPh7usHJwkofTIdIYdtZpbZmj6dy_J1v1L63STrs7qOLJgEEl5eJaNNrSbKyqNEe8c7O5z5PWSEbMFP1cXy6qX5X-KDriyzHNIeYDcgnwi7hdPxJZr_30NmPCsIG_K6oRJw7q6xRm37VHoQQycOMtNMN19TbCjvyIDrfaHlQIQPlevaa0XfiHgHBPlEEMCEt6OW4QSav7KCnDK_kO__apwpZqxrtHVJXV0dvCrsOFYRRc_u2pS9fkaWVC2KpBPHvz-a32eBSmKGdbc-w6kY9VJylqqaPok5oXVuKo4xwngiF1Dv0BI100fRs1-hxvxAjvLejGFXhfP99amn_mc9j0YXEy_hEHe3TltWRMBUP0xHxL7Y_swiRa4T8U-UY0ezdT8ykj6X9hznLYuQE79xa9haXf10C4k9S0FcJRF475ja9IZ34n4kuTN_9w_GQtQ4fpoN74mTH8E13wqZmiZzJP3DHN_t)

name: Arianna Jones, Welch for Vermont
subject: Add your name to show you’re all in for progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We can deliver progress for Vermont and our country, but only if we work together. Add your name to say you’re all in.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=98%2E61531%2EFRcyMq)
Hi There,
It's Arianna again, a campaign manager here at Welch for Vermont. I wanted to take a minute to share what’s on my mind, and why this election will have an outsize impact on protecting our democracy.
It’s clear that right now the stakes couldn't be higher. We need affordable child care for working families in Vermont and urgent climate action now. We need to lower the cost of prescription drugs and protect reproductive rights. This open seat in Vermont could be the difference between passing our positive progressive agenda and Mitch McConnell controlling the Senate again.
With the Senate split 50-50, Democrats cannot afford to lose a single seat. That’s why Peter needs your support. If we’re going to keep Vermont and the Senate blue, we’ll have to do it together.
[**If you’re ready to send Peter to the Senate to fight for our progressive agenda, click here to add your name to our list of public endorsers.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-endorsement?source=em_20220206_p_a_endorse&t=3&akid=98%2E61531%2EFRcyMq)
Peter has a long record of fighting for what’s right – and, as Vermont’s congressman, he has delivered real solutions for some of the most difficult challenges facing Vermonters. Now, Peter is running for Senate to continue that fight for Vermont, for our country, and for our imperiled democracy. If we’re going to help him deliver the progress we need, we must do everything we can to elect him in November. That means assembling a strong grassroots team of supporters like you, from every corner of the state. Our team includes endorsers in 114 towns and all 14 counties, join us as we continue to build this campaign.
[**Please add your name to our growing list of public endorsers. It would mean a lot to have you on our team.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-endorsement?source=em_20220206_p_a_endorse&t=4&akid=98%2E61531%2EFRcyMq)
Thanks,
Arianna Jones,
Campaign Manager, Welch for Vermont

| Hi Peter,

I live in the Orlando area. So imagine my surprise when I heard that Biden was transporting illegal aliens HERE to our area- without so much as notifying the proper authorities?!?

Biden is an open-borders globalist. But he has gone too far- and Governor DeSantis is showing how Florida is standing up to him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am an America First Christian and combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0e83e8a5bc&e=afa21b7626), a swing district south of Orlando. I'm running to bring more of the Free State of Florida to DC!**

The Washington Examiner reports on Gov. DeSantis calling Biden out on Biden's dumping thousands of illegals into Florida:

_"If you’re knowingly involved in that, you’re doing stuff that we don’t want._We don’t want the problems at the southern border to be imported into the state of Florida_ ," DeSantis said during a press conference. "And so people that are instrumental in that, we want to hold accountable by, of course, denying business opportunities with state and local but, maybe even more important, making them pay restitution for all the costs that’s going to end up doing."

The Florida governor commented on a video captured by conservative independent journalist Laura Loomer this week, appearing to show a busload of illegal immigrants being dropped off in Florida.

DeSantis's office previously claimed in November that the Biden administration had sent more than 70 planes full of migrants from the border to Jacksonville.

“Over 70 air charter flights [on] jetliner airliners coming from the southwest border have landed at Jacksonville International Airport,” Larry Keefe, the Republican governor’s public safety czar, said. “On average, there’s 36 passengers on each of these flights. And that has been going on over the course of the summer through September.”_

**Punish all those involved in Biden's illegal open borders scheme. Or send them all to Delaware. But keep them out of Florida!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e2e1372c3e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Now, I am married to a LEGAL immigrant. But those that break the law as their first act of coming here do not deserve to be considered in the same sentence!

Illegal immigration is a MASSIVE problem. In December, DeSantis introduced a number of policies to keep Florida safe from illegal immigration:

_Governor DeSantis announced proposals for the upcoming legislative session to hold accountable private entities that knowingly or recklessly assist the Biden Administration in resettling illegal immigrants into Florida. The legislation would also strengthen E-verify enforcement and codify and build upon the steps he has taken to protect the state of Florida through Executive Order 21-223. Additionally, Governor DeSantis announced that the Department of Children and Families (DCF) published an emergency rule to prohibit the issuance or renewal of any license to house unaccompanied alien minors who seek to be resettled in Florida unless there is a cooperative agreement between the state and federal government._

As Congressman, I pledge to institute each and every one of these into Federal law. **Let's stop rogue Biden and his open borders buddies right now. **

Biden's lawlessness is dangerous and will get Americans- including Floridians- killed. _**I'll stand up to him and be a check on the Biden agenda!**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e7427d3b01&e=afa21b7626)
---
| My Swampy Dem opponent, Darren Soto, LOVES illegal immigration. It's his #1 issue. And Soto is ready to follow Biden off the cliff.

In fact, he votes with Biden on EVERYTHING.

**The swamp doesn't like me though. They know I'll fight Biden- and that's why I need your help!**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up and fought for President Trump and his America First policies!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=549dbe7d4b&e=afa21b7626)

Help me stand up to Biden and his open borders buddies, just like Florida does! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1e6d62b047&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7414a3fa35&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=94adc8a5ef&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d751951288&e=afa21b7626)

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: terrified
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=1)
---
Friend -- I've got a new badge of honor: The Republican National Committee just distinguished myself and Liz Cheney with censure, which is the first step toward ultimately expelling us from the party for aggressively seeking the truth on the January 6th Committee. Why? Because they're terrified. Terrified of the truth; terrified of Trump; terrified of the base they've radicalized; and terrified of you and me. That's the only explanation for censuring two people whose only "crime" is putting _Country over Party_ and the _Truth over Trump_. They claim we're trying to sabotage the GOP and its chances for success in 2022 because we stand up to the BIG LIE that the election was stolen and that the January 6th attacks were "legitimate political discourse." Yeah, that's what the RNC called it. It's actually sad that this isn't more shocking, and we must ensure we never become numb to tactics fit for an authoritarian regime rather than the greatest democracy the world has ever known. This is why we're left with NO CHOICE but to take-on and take-out these toxic leaders -- before they can create one! And that's where our **PRIMARY 1ST** plan comes in, which is a bold, original strategy to mobilize disaffected Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to vote in Republican primaries to defeat the extreme Trump-First candidates seeking to dominate institutions key to maintaining democracy in America, from local election officials to the U.S. Congress. You can learn all about our thrilling strategy [here](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=2): | [](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=3 "PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY") [PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=3)
---
The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, expecting different results. And that's why we're so excited to do something unexpected, and have a real chance to shift the center of gravity and improve the odds that we can elect more Country First candidates to replace poisonous partisans.
But none of us can do it alone, and that's why I'm calling on every member of this movement to find a way to invest however you can in our country's future. Would you please consider:
**> >** [Getting involved](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=4) as a volunteer?
**> >** [Spreading the word](https://www.country1st.com/action?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=5) to your friends, family, and any other likeminded person?
**> >** [Giving](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=6) a gift to fund the mission?
Whether you can do one thing or all of the things, our collective actions add up to making a huge difference. And armed with our primary election strategy, we've got even more important work to do. I know I'm ready -- and I hope you're with me!
Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. I couldn't do this without people like you, and I wouldn't want to.
Country First,

Adam
PS: We just released a new episode of our podcast [Country First Conversations](https://www.country1st.com/podcast?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=7), in which I sit down with theologian and pastor Dr. Russell Moore to discuss false prophets and politics. If you like podcasts, check it out!
[](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=8 "Stand with Country First") [Stand with Country First](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=8)
---
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap to make sure you’re up to date. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Republican National Committee [censures](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHp0BZTXfxSmwHt74CjGw8qwUAZR4bOpSqvy9Q89jiDFucJ2WRvuBLAjeOHSoNpKcUGCMsYL0c2DxVxdN59ZPdn6ka7KbJ362X32E8GgffDPh&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=9) Rep. Adam Kinzinger and Rep. Liz Cheney for participation on 1/6 Committee and calls events of 1/6 "legitimate political discourse."
* Rep. Kinzinger [reacts](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUaasnHhGjZo0uEy0quap1jnxU8_m6dQ-NI2Kqsa9BHpkmB55N92AVo1_1VYsf0XFzMCi0TbIj--nlAdj_ffoXs-5FURZ7ukN44SkQPS1ADGP_K-MHKTUxmQqqR2ST0BdZw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=10) on social media to claims made by Ted Cruz that Ray Epps was working in concert with the FBI on January 6th.
* Following former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich’s appearance on [Fox News Channel](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=H-qEORLjmEZ0R4IEh6LC5XiIMMZLzL0JDt_4-dFf5VzY65UDuxDHxfhSpA41VVSAm4S0mrUGPYCacsStE9M7w-3QuhAqbs6J2ZQZHIux_5JW89j7QJfG_ZmNjSy-XkRkYQFVgtdaOjufCuORU4ZffK2LAkoxVUCeTLIVYK9VRMs&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=11), Rep. Kinzinger and Rep. Cheney denounced the idea that a new, Republican-based congress could prosecute members of the 1/6 committee.

**New Requests for Information from 1/6 Committee:**
* Ivanka Trump, [daughter](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHZjStMLtV596VQTJZ3h4tWLDZsUHa7452megdIf0Dd8u4LAjlMXMp0neV6xly9E5RA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=12) of former President Trump
* Subpoena issued for Nicholas J. Fuentes and Patrick Casey, [leaders](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHbvCzIRluAe73I8quvpf3tp2SrgWe89pvKybemFhT4h5fpbMLKyFDXa7s_IjjoFCTA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=13) of “America First”
* Subpoena issued for Rudolph (Rudy) Gulliani, Trump [lawyer](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHYAID2iuUco7XQW91g_cXPqKs1vpjmdYv_tB5RdWGF46eltVowxOvuoUrUNOl677D0qcJs-HevBHumnudDJC-Mq4CkRKfwttexf9ZVLQco4P&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=14)
* Subpoena issued for Jenna Ellis, Trump [lawyer](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHYAID2iuUco7XQW91g_cXPqKs1vpjmdYv_tB5RdWGF46eltVowxOvuoUrUNOl677D0qcJs-HevBHumnudDJC-Mq4CkRKfwttexf9ZVLQco4P&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=15)
* Subpoena issued for Sidney Powell, Trump [lawyer](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHYAID2iuUco7XQW91g_cXPqKs1vpjmdYv_tB5RdWGF46eltVowxOvuoUrUNOl677D0qcJs-HevBHumnudDJC-Mq4CkRKfwttexf9ZVLQco4P&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=16)
* Subpoena issued for Boris Epshteyn, strategic [advisor](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHYAID2iuUco7XQW91g_cXPqKs1vpjmdYv_tB5RdWGF46eltVowxOvuoUrUNOl677D0qcJs-HevBHumnudDJC-Mq4CkRKfwttexf9ZVLQco4P&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=17) for the Donald Trump's 2020 presidential campaign

Here are the major developments from this past week: **Former Vice President Mike Pence’s Records to be Turned Over by the National Archives** Several of former Vice President Mike Pence’s top aides have already [appeared](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNkATA9KZprbPlf8QSDw05X8pYb8mvELtx8BAQXIdYgrApXTrrI1ZvUID3pp5eYKEG15ls1owvfGc2c2U049CjdXuuxj45gBmdXBn0E31_9Y9Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=18) before the 1/6 Committee to give testimony regarding the events that unfolded on and before January 6th. The top aides, including Pence's former chief of staff Marc Short, counsel Greg Jacob, and Pence's former national security adviser Keith Kellogg have shed light on the days and hours leading up to the deadly insurrection. The 1/6 committee wants more. In a letter posted on its website, the National Archives revealed it will be producing the former Vice President’s official records to the 1/6 Committee. This comes after an [order](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv0PGqO6DBt1AnoK2JqKn-mjX9THqfHNVV4A1Jy_9qc3Xn8K7p9Cming4bBbT5X1ocIxDDLRL-t2_hEcgjr5HH8cF_pnGR_o50d_NVXjereX7se_mlcJLjSZ23Zsw-P8UP4z_pr_Nd-ND4wv2UFzsZSM&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=19) from the White House for these records to be released. These records will be sent over no later than March 3 to the committee. The 1/6 committee has received over 60,000 pages of records and interviewed more than 470 witnesses. **1/6 Committee Subpoenas 14 "Alternate Electors" from 7 States** On Friday, the 1/6 committee issued [subpoenas](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6dpsDbCyqpvA-M-6KkpGuHUZF9vtWwoP49Nyz126Xw-XWNltJ3G_af56DPmc2CRWYJjyVzbUXRmaBLHlQ0ermMg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=20) for 14 "alternate electors" from the seven states the former President claimed had sufficient voter fraud that kept him from winning. GOP leaders from Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, New Mexico, Nevada, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania served as "alternates" in case GOP members of Congress were successful in their attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election. "The Select Committee is seeking information about attempts in multiple states to overturn the results of the 2020 election, including the planning and coordination of efforts to send false slates of electors to the National Archives" said Rep. Bennie Thompson (D-Miss) of this batch of subpoenas. "We believe the individuals we have subpoenaed today have information about how these so-called alternate electors met and who was behind that scheme." In the subpoena letters, the 1/6 committee says the witnesses have [fake](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHthN91zANLr8kTjzNYOPvyPlXS32rZBqSzdm00FqoI5dR8ooDRaEdrLj6BfRCqdAzyS1nI-YpAcANaSkGBPizNhNAbt5UeHBafOIPoUxLki1&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=21) elector certificates in their possession. **Supreme Court Grants Access to Final Tranche of Requested Trump Administration Records to 1/6 Committee** Following months of contentious litigation, the 1/6 Committee is now in possession of more than [750 documents](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=H-qEORLjmEZ0R4IEh6LC5XiIMMZLzL0JDt_4-dFf5VzY65UDuxDHxfhSpA41VVSAaBuKAzgUFgK4i0cJaJSnQsO9OLCgefp4LXXJbPn9AL999j0sEYFAgfwJMpIxLbOD3bMCmPfY8mq0_teYS1NhlfhgbPH1lwXDMjdUEsuARn0&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=22) from the Trump administration that the former president attempted to keep sealed. The document production comes after the U.S. District Court and Circuit Court of Appeals affirmed the committee’s rights to the information, citing that it is in the best interest of the American public for the information to be shared with investigators. Trump appealed the Circuit Court decision to the Supreme Court, where in an 8-1 ruling (with only Associate Justice Clarence Thomas dissenting), a majority [declined](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNlPabWFJ_EFo5QncZjkzkBXhlxRBNaW-yzAYN-ccAuB663_6_2HjFGkvgZ0t_BGSKJsXCitB5BaSMHo0pv5O-6qMc7wCqQd7wEbrmS4JHY5gg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=23) to hear the case and thereby granting the committee access to the documents. The records were transferred to the committee from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) on Thursday evening in compliance with the request of investigators and court orders. Though the specific contents of the documents remain in the hands of investigators, sources familiar with the investigation have cited presidential diary entries, visitor logs, drafts of speeches, and the handwritten notes of former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows as among the materials. **1/6 Committee is Looking into Former President’s Plan to Seize Voting Machines** On February 1st, the _New York Times_ reported the 1/6 committee is [investigating](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zFWNfS5M7m0hI0A1HIXXXQk7BDYD24-nz8ufxb2Pa1sOgs_FztSiOsxZs0n1pE1QkByWKqfqjUagJkT_ChkhyVQos7pDSyWR_FivbYn42-ZaZyJv0F9oodmXdY-CEVULJY&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=24) the former President’s plan to seize voting machines in several key states and use federal funds for election litigation. The 1/6 Committee obtained an unsent memo drafted by close aides to President Trump directing the Pentagon to seize voting machines across the country. **Founder of Oath Keepers and nine other members plead not-guilty to 1/6 Sedition Charges** Stewart Rhodes, founder of the extremist group Oath Keepers, and nine other alleged co-conspirators [pleaded](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_Ne2_dvt_-iTPYIUPr-0aOYj0lfdWQnNl-iGnplNme--XJomdrG3B1ZOyWds8h-_4QDi22WnFmjnzxsMHcCSf-c&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=25) not guilty to seditious conspiracy and other charges related to the January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol by a pro-Trump mob. Rhodes and those charged with him are accused of plotting violence to prevent the confirmation of Joe Biden’s election victory. A 48-page indictment alleges that the charged defendants plotted “multiple ways to deploy force” to stop the lawful transfer of presidential power. Specifically, to organize into teams, undergo paramilitary training, coordinate travel, assemble and stage weapons, and don combat and tactical gear. Mr. Rhodes was denied bail. Citing flight risk, the Judge listed his "elaborate escape tunnels” and a stash of unregistered cars on his property. Mr. Rhodes appeared via Zoom in front of the 1/6 committee on February 2nd where he gave nearly [six hours](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcogVPahDLNLISltFtrlcixY7cjzXuEkl9JVpN1UY2Zh5-8nTrN5oS03zreGYrqSgyfeYciKVfgxDLuZIstcbX94&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=26) of testimony. Both he and his lawyer pleaded the fifth for much of the interview but did give some answers. **Memos Show Roots of Trump’s Focus on 1/6 and Alternate Electors** A [memo](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd7YxfyyjiC2C6uQqWf_LEF6kPsrqFSBprQlnMaX_fXwo-ECu6o_XhZVK4dXALK4Z-oDU9AuLBm2Q2WFyAFH4Lsk&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=27) sent out on November 18, 2021 has given the 1/6 Committee insight into the former president’s focus on maintaining power. In [newly released memos](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd2zXrUvy-aBRfZKMgScLe_wE5lgBEwHAJGtoiA4dfV3nyFKh1blKQkYmsmLkJezE43-m8ulAL0II7YsN3ClPdG8-TLZNqMB6Yui4h5vgHJJA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=28), we see the former president and his team begin to create a strategy to pressure Vice President Mike Pence to decertify the election results on January 6th. **Other news that may be of interest:**
* [Conspiracy](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=H-qEORLjmEZ0R4IEh6LC5XiIMMZLzL0JDt_4-dFf5VzY65UDuxDHxfhSpA41VVSAmBreZkPh2kH0I-dotFeomCZGX6R2A1HS9QFUFLcsY8yfpSsfGeo-u_I-NmZgh7y72hIZMurwy7-mXYVvXcfskw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=29) Theorist and Podcast Host Alex Jones tells listeners he pleaded the Fifth over 100 times during questioning by the 1/6 Committee.
* Former White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany [turned](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNm8-xMAKTXXd4r18nAHGFeDvi1HKnneTQwHLolt5DHJzVy1Gx14Z1u9WI11XaNJiHUBaz2YySN11EkQYJqWP7DjtrVDQJ8iyFxJkbSBvA5Srw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=30)[ over](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=cTomZN3YTronSSAYl7jqNURytNlqhXOR2GwP-G9cfNm8-xMAKTXXd4r18nAHGFeDvi1HKnneTQwHLolt5DHJzVy1Gx14Z1u9WI11XaNJiHUBaz2YySN11EkQYJqWP7DjtrVDQJ8iyFxJkbSBvA5Srw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=31) text messages to the 1/6 Committee.
* Republican Attorney General [fires](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDaKOj03sgJkccgV0DPx3SdEdyvA6WXi1UgtmSLJFVR4LMzId6ZHZg1StSG6LwOnecJ9VZj2TRnq3gxkRXLuq4tapyxC_F18Kf9i_zh70nc86Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=32) lawyer that is working for the 1/6 Committee from state post.
* Former DOJ official Jeffery Clark [pleaded](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHq9i8pX680xu0bN1TkXB2pe00C0r8MFmuRW22O9pIRgeDbaY-Ex5TTS0VgmGdHQq2iXQMJ7ktLe678kXYsKEottkAKWJVB1EeULn4gxTXeyyY-H8zmDwSR2s8eKUwNNRDg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=33) the fifth more than 100 times in 1/6 interview.
* Newly reported [videos](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHr2mF3ZyF4hSxzCEtoIA72FblRMrUpTi5NHA8Zuw44VCO-XwBzpLoXNNAuQ1T0n9LmqDcR16zIH310MWlRRNXLDldF7q_UE8NKVOBeTja2L1&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=34) of Stop the Steal rally organizer Ali Alexander offer footage of the social media personality suggesting a willingness to work with the far-right extremist groups the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers to provide security for the event.
* Members of the 1/6 committee [respond](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=HVBK5x9dnBx-ujVjYaP8mYb8lfuh9xzrz1uEAGNXGUmJAR8jqlWy0xkwMfJGNIeOc3VhOuzzx97sWlgHriwY_gzBbgGga10GYP-_2A5OOKWmR8uGOL1EI9h5RPtjGHcG9_RnTFYW68AkEh7flxSaHDKefcHIJFIPznlVw6RG2xmBzxUyqurIRpHj5hLNwBCJ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=35) to Newt Gingrich’s threat of criminal [prosecution](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9bmQjRYvg5RiftfZZQBIKJ9979stN6VModE12W5-K9fjNA548wHUAy52Icj8V4RN4k8wMvZB3JENaeX2FpCSCjG9FlITsIDRAVzuQlgYWP-Z&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=censure_nd_nv_s&n=36).

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- I've got a new badge of honor: The Republican National Committee just distinguished myself and Liz Cheney with censure, which is the first step toward ultimately expelling us from the party for aggressively seeking the truth on the January 6th Committee. Why? Because they're terrified. Terrified of the truth; terrified of Trump; terrified of the base they've radicalized; and terrified of you and me. That's the only explanation for censuring two people whose only "crime" is putting Country over Party and the Truth over Trump. They claim we're trying to sabotage the GOP and its chances for success in 2022 because we stand up to the BIG LIE that the election was stolen and that the January 6th attacks were "legitimate political discourse." Yeah, that's what the RNC called it. It's actually sad that this isn't more shocking, and we must ensure we never become numb to tactics fit for an authoritarian regime rather than the greatest democracy the world has ever known. This is why we're left with NO CHOICE but to take-on and take-out these toxic leaders -- before they can create one! And that's where our PRIMARY 1ST plan comes in, which is a bold, original strategy to mobilize disaffected Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to vote in Republican primaries to defeat the extreme Trump-First candidates seeking to dominate institutions key to maintaining democracy in America, from local election officials to the U.S. Congress. You can learn all about our thrilling strategy : | "PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY" The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, expecting different results. And that's why we're so excited to do something unexpected, and have a real chance to shift the center of gravity and improve the odds that we can elect more Country First candidates to replace poisonous partisans. But none of us can do it alone, and that's why I'm calling on every member of this movement to find a way to invest however you can in our country's future. Would you please consider: > as a volunteer? > to your friends, family, and any other likeminded person? > a gift to fund the mission? Whether you can do one thing or all of the things, our collective actions add up to making a huge difference. And armed with our primary election strategy, we've got even more important work to do. I know I'm ready -- and I hope you're with me! Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. I couldn't do this without people like you, and I wouldn't want to. Country First, Adam PS: We just released a new episode of our podcast , in which I sit down with theologian and pastor Dr. Russell Moore to discuss false prophets and politics. Fuentes and Patrick Casey, of “America First” Subpoena issued for Rudolph (Rudy) Gulliani, Trump Subpoena issued for Jenna Ellis, Trump Subpoena issued for Sidney Powell, Trump Subpoena issued for Boris Epshteyn, strategic for the Donald Trump's 2020 presidential campaign Here are the major developments from this past week: Former Vice President Mike Pence’s Records to be Turned Over by the National Archives Several of former Vice President Mike Pence’s top aides have already before the 1/6 Committee to give testimony regarding the events that unfolded on and before January 6th. The top aides, including Pence's former chief of staff Marc Short, counsel Greg Jacob, and Pence's former national security adviser Keith Kellogg have shed light on the days and hours leading up to the deadly insurrection. The 1/6 committee wants more. In a letter posted on its website, the National Archives revealed it will be producing the former Vice President’s official records to the 1/6 Committee. This comes after an from the White House for these records to be released. These records will be sent over no later than March 3 to the committee. The 1/6 committee has received over 60,000 pages of records and interviewed more than 470 witnesses. 1/6 Committee Subpoenas 14 "Alternate Electors" from 7 States On Friday, the 1/6 committee issued for 14 "alternate electors" from the seven states the former President claimed had sufficient voter fraud that kept him from winning. GOP leaders from Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, New Mexico, Nevada, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania served as "alternates" in case GOP members of Congress were successful in their attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election. "The Select Committee is seeking information about attempts in multiple states to overturn the results of the 2020 election, including the planning and coordination of efforts to send false slates of electors to the National Archives" said Rep. Bennie Thompson (D-Miss) of this batch of subpoenas. "We believe the individuals we have subpoenaed today have information about how these so-called alternate electors met and who was behind that scheme." In the subpoena letters, the 1/6 committee says the witnesses have elector certificates in their possession. Supreme Court Grants Access to Final Tranche of Requested Trump Administration Records to 1/6 Committee Following months of contentious litigation, the 1/6 Committee is now in possession of more than from the Trump administration that the former president attempted to keep sealed. The document production comes after the U.S. District Court and Circuit Court of Appeals affirmed the committee’s rights to the information, citing that it is in the best interest of the American public for the information to be shared with investigators. Trump appealed the Circuit Court decision to the Supreme Court, where in an 8-1 ruling (with only Associate Justice Clarence Thomas dissenting), a majority to hear the case and thereby granting the committee access to the documents. The records were transferred to the committee from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) on Thursday evening in compliance with the request of investigators and court orders. Though the specific contents of the documents remain in the hands of investigators, sources familiar with the investigation have cited presidential diary entries, visitor logs, drafts of speeches, and the handwritten notes of former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows as among the materials. 1/6 Committee is Looking into Former President’s Plan to Seize Voting Machines On February 1st, the New York Times reported the 1/6 committee is the former President’s plan to seize voting machines in several key states and use federal funds for election litigation. The 1/6 Committee obtained an unsent memo drafted by close aides to President Trump directing the Pentagon to seize voting machines across the country. Founder of Oath Keepers and nine other members plead not-guilty to 1/6 Sedition Charges Stewart Rhodes, founder of the extremist group Oath Keepers, and nine other alleged co-conspirators not guilty to seditious conspiracy and other charges related to the January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol by a pro-Trump mob. Rhodes and those charged with him are accused of plotting violence to prevent the confirmation of Joe Biden’s election victory. A 48-page indictment alleges that the charged defendants plotted “multiple ways to deploy force” to stop the lawful transfer of presidential power. Specifically, to organize into teams, undergo paramilitary training, coordinate travel, assemble and stage weapons, and don combat and tactical gear. Mr. Rhodes was denied bail. Citing flight risk, the Judge listed his "elaborate escape tunnels” and a stash of unregistered cars on his property. Mr. Rhodes appeared via Zoom in front of the 1/6 committee on February 2nd where he gave nearly of testimony. Both he and his lawyer pleaded the fifth for much of the interview but did give some answers.
